CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: Allow DeepDVC Feature when user is offline
Shader Cache - Control Flags for automated testing
Screen position by % of latency flash indicator (0x10834F15)
Screen position by % of latency flash indicator (0x10834F16)
Width in pixels of latency flash indicator
Background Application Max Frame Rate for NVCPL
Enable/Disable Dynamic FPS Feature based on NESTED_IDLE_AND_FRAMECOMPARISON
Configure Dynamic FPS Feature mode as DYNAMIC_FRL_MODE
Height in pixels of latency flash indicator
DLSS - Override Performance to be Ultra Performance
DLSS - Override DLSS modes to be DLAA

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: APP - Enable dual core optimizations unless the application requested to disable them
Default - DX10 present will be in default mode
Sync - DX10 present will be sync call
Async - DX10 present will be async call
Enable_LargeVA - Enable large VA on all GPUs
Enable_LargeVA_Quadro - Enable large VA on Quadro GPUs
Enable_LargeVA_Quadro_Tesla - Enable large VA on Quadro Tesla GPUs
On - Force enable deferred context cap
Sync - All DX9 presents will be synchronous
Async - All DX9 presents will be asynchronous if AllowFlipBatching is set
Async full screen - Only full screen DX9 presents will be asynchronous if AllowFlipBatching is set
Force Async - All DX9 presents will be asynchronous
Force Async full screen - Only full screen DX9 presents will be asynchronous
On - Prohibit stereo shim in DX apps
On - Replaces all Z16 requests with Z24X8
Enable - Enable the 3DSMax shim layer on Quadro and GeForce SMB GPUs
Enable GEFORCE - Enable the 3DSMax shim layer on GeForce and Quadro (DEVELOP/DEBUG only)
IGNORE_LOAD_BALANCING - debug: Ignore gpu load, apply always
IGNORE_GARBAGE_COLLECT_THRESHOLD - debug: Ignore fill status and garbage collect every frame
COMPILE_IMMEDIATELY - debug: stall in the driver thread until the compile result arrives
LIMIT_SHADER_CREATION_TO_ONE_THREAD - Limit number of spawned threads to one (rather than the number of cores) for async creations
LIMIT_OPTIMIZED_SHADER_RECOMPILE_TO_ONE_THREAD - Limit number of spawned threads to one (rather than the number of cores) for optimized shader recompiles
DISABLE_MULTI_APP_THREAD_HEURISTIC - Disable heuristic for detecting multiple app threads compiling shaders
DISABLE_OPTIMIZED_SHADER_RECOMPILE - Recompile multiple optimized versions of shaders
DISABLE_SHADER_CREATION - Compile multiple shaders in parallel at creation
ALLOW_NONBLOCKING_NVAPI - Generally allow some nvapi calls to not block async device
ALLOW_NOBLOCKING_SLISTATE - Allow specific non-blocking optimizations for GetCurrentSliState NVAPI
Default - How many out of order query getData calls are allowed before stalling the Async Device
Disallow the use of the CPU Visible segement
RTs/ZBs use maximum priority on mixed-bus GPUs (192-bit 2 GB, etc.)
On - Track read-only DSVs as last having been bound to PS to catch WAR hazards between early-z and PS
App - Enable AsyncDevice except in configs that do not work (some SLI, Optimus) or if the application requested to disable them
When safe - Enable AsyncDevice except in configs that do not work (some SLI, Optimus)
Off - Disable AsyncDevice and MS dual core optimization
On - Enable AsyncDevice ignoring safety or application requests
On if Quadro - Enable AsyncDevice if a Quadro or GeForce SMB GPU is being used, otherwise disable AsyncDevice and MS dual core optimization
Microsoft - Disable AsyncDevice but allow MS dual core optimization
Off - Disable the copy engine blitter
On - Enable the copy engine blitter
FORCE_CE_BLIT - Force using CE blitter even if CE perfstrategy says otherwise
FORCE_BASIC_MODEL - Force to run copy engine in basic model (default is basic prime)
IGNORE_MIN_CE_TRANSFER_SIZE - Ignore d3dreg key MIN_CE_TRANSFER_SIZE and allow all transfer sizes by CE
ENABLE_CE_UPLOADS Enable - Copy Engine Async Uploads
FORCE_CE_UPLOADS Force - Copy Engine Async Uploads for all uploads (ignoring location of destination surface)
ENABLE_LZO_COMPRESSION - Enable LZO compression for the Uploads
FORCE_LZO_COMPRESSION - Force LZO compression for all uploads (even if we have to stall)
DISABLE_DYNAMIC_PROMOTION - Don't promote VBs that are locked even if drawn from extensively
DISABLE_STATIC_PROMOTION Don't promote VBs that are never even locked
DO_NOT_DISCARD_ON_SCREENSIZE_A2B10G10R10_RTT - Respect sync on screensize A2B10G10R10 RTT, Dirt: Showdown specific hack
SKIP_TINY_TEXTURE_RESOLVE_ON_BLITTING - Ignore small texture (up to 2x2) resolve on blit, Stormrise specific hack
FORCE_RESOLVE_ON_SLAVES_FOR_SHARED_RESOURCES - Force resolve on slave GPUs for shared resources, specific for Lucas Arts Hive Engine Demo
IGNORE_READ_LOCK_FOR_STAGING_TEXTURES - Ignore CPU read lock for staging textures - real hack, specific to Red Faction: Armageddon
EARLY_PUSH_ALL_SUBRESOURCES - Defer early push of subresources with hope that we an early push the entire resource
SKIP_NOSUBRES_RTT_BUT_TINY_RESOLVE_ON_TEXTURING - Don't resolve textures before texturing unless they are tiny (2x2), but respect resolve for resources with subresources
CRYSIS2_HACK_POSTMSAAEDGEFILTERNV_OVERRIDE - Fix up Crysis2 binary to be consistent with SLI
CAP_PERF_TO_TDP_LIMIT_3_4_Way - Cap the clocks to not go beyond the TDP limit for 3/4-way SLI
FORCE_REPORT_NO_SLI_SUPPORT_FROM_NVAPI - If applition has buggy its own SLI support we need to do SLI magic in the driver and force app think it's run on single GPU
DO_NOT_DISCARD_ON_MIDSIZE_TEXTURE_ABGR8_RTT - Syncs on ABGR8 RTT or on any RTT's with 0x100X0x100 size,COD:B02 fetches Online status of player
DISCARD_ON_NOT_EQUALLY_DIRTY_CUBE_MIP_RTT - Discard content of cube maped or mip mapped textures only if number of dirty subres isn't equal number of valid subres
IGNORE_DISCARD_SRT - Ignore both of the DISCARD_*_SRT bits when the render target has been synced for texturing
DO_RESOLVE_ON_RTT_MATCHED_PRIMARY - Ignore discard on RT textures matched to primary size
DISCARD_ON_G16R16_OR_MIDSIZE_ON_TEXTURING - Discard syncs unconditionally on G16R16 RTT or on any RTTs with 0x200X0x200 size, Wow after patch 5.2 hack
CRYSIS2_HACK_POSTMSAAEDGEFILTERNV_OVERRIDE - Fix up Crysis2 binary to be consistent with SLI
FORCE_REPORT_NO_SLI_SUPPORT_FROM_NVAPI - If application has buggy its own SLI support we need to do SLI magic in the driver and force app think it's run on single GPU
Do not use broadcast at all
DYNAMIC_BROADCAST_RENDER_TO_TEXTURE - Use broadcast to render interframe depandent content
DYNAMIC_BROADCAST_TO_TEXTURES_WITH_SUBRESOURCES_ONLY - Allow dynamic broadcast for textures with subresources (cubemap/mipmap) only
ENABLE_BLIT_BASED_BROADCAST_STATE_CHANGES - Enable blit-based broadcast state changes
STATIC_BROADCAST_TO_TEXTURES_WITH_SUBRESOURCES - Force broadcast on resources with subresorces (cubemap/mipmap)
STATIC_BROADCAST _TO_1LINE_32BIT_TEXTURES - Force broadcast on 32 bit textures which has one pixel height but more than 1 pixel width
LIMIT_BROADCAST_SPREADING_TO_ONE_LEVEL - Limit broadcast spreading only to one level up
RESPECT _BROADCAST_ZB_RESOLVE_ON_INACTIVE_GPUS - Do not discard sync on ZB if we try to resolve inactive GPUs in broadcast
Nothing - Do not validate any input
COPYREGION - Validate input on CopyRegion functions
INTERPRET_NEGATIVE - Validate input considering negative input even if the parameter type is unsigned
DX11_FORCE_DDI_CRITICAL_SECTION - Force a critical section on all non-reentrant DX11 DDI
DX11_FORCE_DDI_CRITICAL_SECTION_FOR_STEREO - Force a critical section on all non-reentrant DX11 DDI if stereo shim is enabled
Max - Specifies max register allowed when compiling/optimizing a shader
Off - Limit max number of pending command buffers (per context) in software queue. If key is set zero it will be ignored
Disallow - Disable sysmem caching for textures
ALLOW_FOR_TEXTURES_WITHOUT_SUBRESOURCES - Allow for textures without subresources only (default)
ALLOW_FOR_TEXTURES_WITH_SUBRESOURCES - Allow for textures with mips
Default - Threshold in megabytes for using of RT/ZB allocations as LinkInstanced (SLI DX9/10)
Default - size of host staging buffer, mostly for early push
DISABLE_OFFER_SMALL_BLOCKS - Disable offering of suballocated Blocks
RTs/ZBs use maximum priority on mixed-bus GPUs (192-bit 2 GB, etc.)
Default - Set size of write staging buffer. If key is set to zero it will be ignored
On - Try to avoid host remappers. If application is locking BL RT in vidmem, demote it to pitch so that lock won't require remapper.
DISABLE_TWOD - Disable TwoD engine local transfers optimization
ENABLE_WINDOWED_AFR - Enable AFR support for windowed applications
DISABLE_CE_TRANSFER_2WAY - Disable CE transfer on 2 way systems
DISABLE_CE_TRANSFER_3WAY - Disable CE transfer on 3 way systems
DISABLE_CE_TRANSFER_4WAY - Disable CE transfer on 4 way systems
UNICAST_CE_TRANSFER_2WAY - Use unicast CE transfer on 2 way systems
UNICAST_CE_TRANSFER_3WAY - Use unicast CE transfer on 3 way systems
UNICAST_CE_TRANSFER_4WAY - Use unicast CE transfer on 4 way systems
FORCE_BAR1_WAR - Always request aliasing for DX9 primaries
ENABLED_3D - Force 1X tex on 2x_TEX parts for 3D channels
ENABLED_COMPUTE - Force 1X tex on 2x_TEX parts for COMPUTE channels
Limit max amount of memory used for renaming on XP
Show Fullscreen/Flip Status and Flip Counter
GRAPH_FLIP_FPS - FPS graph, measured on display hw flip
GRAPH_PRESENT_FPS - FPS graph, measured when the user mode driver starts processing present
GRAPH_APP_PRESENT_FPS - FPS graph, measured on app present
DISPLAY_PAGING - Add red paging indicator bars to the GRAPH_PRESENT_FPS graph
DISPLAY_APP_THREAD_WAIT - Add app thread wait time indiator bars to the GRAPH_APP_PRESENT_FPS graph
Static - each GPU receives a equal amount of pixels to process
Dynamic - moves the split line dynamically to accomodate the load
Static - The driver always uses Alpha fraction set via PS_ALPHABETA_FRACTION
Dynamic_Shader - The driver adjusts a shader unique Alpha fraction via AlphaBeta clocks
Dynamic_VBIB - The driver adjusts a vb/ib ID unique Alpha fraction via AlphaBeta clocks
Default - Fixed Alpha fraction to use when PS_ALPHABETA is in static mode
SELECTOR_USER - do what the user says
SELECTOR_COND - do what the user says unless the app already specified something
SELECTOR_USER - do what the user says
SELECTOR_COND - do what the user says unless the app already specified something
Disabled - Disable CE for tranfers on MS hybrid
Enabled - Enable CE for tranfers on MS hybrid
SRS_1714_WIN8_STEREO - Enable wks stereo for native dx11 Win8 stereo
WIN8_STEREO_EXPORT_IF_ENABLED - Export wddm 1.2 stereo modes only if wks stereo is enabled
HDMI_STEREO - Enables HDMI stereo by overriding any suitable display mode to stereo
HDMI_EXCLUSIVE_STEREO - Enables stereo just on HDMI displays (requires HDMI_STEREO)
TFP_CLAIM_EXCLUSIVE_MUTEX - TEAR FREE PRESENT acquires exclusive mutex
USE_ANY_FRAME_FLIP_STEREO_MODE_FOR_TFP_AND_SWAPGROUP - Use ANY_FRAME instead of PAIR_FLIP flipping mode on Kepler when tearfree or swapgroup is enabled
Enabled - Do not use FSAA modes for single buffered clients (this helps a lot with Studio Tools 10 which draws menues with OpenGL)
Disabled - VRAM address passed directly back to the application, may not survive mode switch
Enabled - Virtual Address created for VBUM card references, safer for mode switching
False - Default driver behavior (old setting, used by NVEmulate)
True - Enabled for all profiles and all shaders (old setting, used by NVEmulate).
Disabled always - Disabled for all profiles and all shaders (only for debug and to avoid breaking shipping apps).
Enabled For Version - Enabled for shaders with #version; disabled otherwise
Enabled For Core or Version - Enabled when using the core and ES profiles, or for shaders with #version; disabled otherwise.
Enabled always - Enabled for all profiles and all shaders
DXGKRNL_WAIT - Use Dxgkrnl to block on the vsync event
SPIN_WAIT - Spin wait on the vsync by polling the scan line
DRIVER_DECIDE - The driver chooses the best wait method
Disable - Do not force texture flushes
Enable - Force flushing textures after cooking them
CACHE_GLSL_OBJECTS - Cache calls to glGetUniformLocation and glIsShader
CACHE_GL_STATE - Cache calls to glIsEnabled for a subset of state
CACHE_MATRIX - Cache calls to glGetFloatv for GL_PROJECTION_MATRIX and GL_MODELVIEW_MATRIX
Enabled - Some applications have problems with opengl 1.3 -> export opengl 1.2 only
Enabled - Use direct pushbuffer, not cached pushbuffer
Enabled - Post VAB generalizes the vertex shader to test the source of each vertex attribute used. Allows enabled array state to change without requiring a new vertex shader
ENABLE_DFLIP_ALWAYS - enable use of direct flip API parameters
ENABLE_NON_STEREO - enable DX present on non-stereo windows
ENABLE_FULLSCREEN_WIN7_STEREO - enable Win7 fullscreen stereo mechanism
USE_APP_DETECT - Use App Detection to decide
FORCE_ON - Force NX6 Plus Mode regardless of app
FORCE_OFF - Force NX6 Plus Mode off regardless of app
Enabled - Don't fall back to SW buffers if HW buffer allocations fail
Enabled - Advertise OpenGL 2.1 for G80+ GPUs (instead of OpenGL 3.0)
Enabled - Forces a front buffer update on copy pixels, for broken applications using front buffer rendering without glFlush calls
Enabled - Workaround for Pro/E's wrong vertex array enables
53_BIT - VC7.1 RT (mistakenly) clobbers the FP precision. This emulates the behavior in newer runtimes, such as VC10
Enabled - Add cycles to check for identity matrix math in some cases. Limited to app bit to reduce risk, quadro differentiator
Disable - disable multimon buffer, fall back to older MM multimon
Allow - allow multimon buffer, uMMB when UBB is enabled
ALLOW_ONLY_NONUNIFIED - allow, but when UBB is enabled fall back to non-unified MMB
Enabled - Final override for exporting PFD_SUPPORT_GDI. If this bit is set, PFD_SUPPORT_GDI will not be set, regardless of OGL_PfdAdjust or OGL_VistaControlFlags values
Enabled - Disables the mapping of video memory to system memory, consumes too much in Vista
Enabled - Enable the Workstation Performance Code, CLAW
Enabled - Enable GeForce optimizations on a Quadro
Enabled - Enable the Lazy VBUM optimization for VBOs

Enabled - Hide float color extensions (GL_ARB_color_buffer_float; GLX_ARB_fbconfig_float for X11/GLX; WGL_ARB_pixel_format_float for Windows/WGL) if GPU resorts to software fallback possible due to lack of two-sided lighting support (only on NV4x/G7x)
Disabled - prevent the creation of a suspended worker thread on Quadro
Enable - For Quadro, report depth 24 / stencil 0 formats as depth 32
CACHE_GLSL_OBJECTS - Cache calls to glGetUniformLocation and glIsShader
CACHE_GL_STATE - Cache calls to glIsEnabled for a subset of state
CACHE_MATRIX - Cache Calls to glGetFloatv for GL_PROJECTION_MATRIX and GL_MODELVIEW_MATRIX
Disabled - Disable centroid sampling G80 only
Enabled - Ignore all swap hint rects
Enabled - WAR for apps that exploit old-style vertex array access bugs such as KOTOR2
ENABLE - Bit set to use SLI DL optimisations
PUSH - USE PUSH P2P instead of pull
LIMIT_DL - limit download to one subdivce
LIMIT_CE - limit CE to use only one engine
CHUNKS - number of chunks to use
SKIP_P2P - skip P2P but use rest of algorithm
ONE_2_MANY - copy from one GPU to many
BASE - Enable by default with CE
FORCE_ENABLE - Enable nvInst->NVIR conversion, regardless of defaults
FORCE_DISABLE - Disable nvInst->NVIR conversion, regardless of defaults
Enabled - Fast immediate mode path enable
0x00000001 SYNC_VID2VID - Vid2Vid copies (CopyTexImage) update remote gpus
0x00000004 TRACK_DIRTY_VIEWPORT - Fallback if usage of glViewport leaves undefined backbuffer content
0x00000008 TRACK_DIRTY_DEPTHSTENCIL - Fallback if depth/stencilbuffer is not cleared after toggling gpu
0x00000010 SYNC_SLAVE_FOR_MASTER_TRANSITION - Sync master image to slave on AFR_MASTER to AFR transition
0x00080000 SYNC_VID2VID_DELAY_ONE_FRAME - Defer P2P texture updates until a texture is used more than one frame later

0x00F00000 DISABLE_AFR_FOR_RT_SIZE_MASK - Disable render target width and height smaller or equal to this value. For example, if value is 8 then a render target with both width and height below or equal 8, disable AFR for that target
0x0F000000 AFR_EARLY_PUSH_RT_SIZE_MASK - Early push small AFR render targets. If the render target width and height both smaller or equal to this value, do early push
0x00000010 TOKENIZER_USE_EVENT_ON_LOAD - Forces the tokenizer to use events to wait for the player if a hyperthreaded system is on high load
0x00000020 PLAYER_USE_SPIN - Allows the player to spin when waiting for commands
0x00000100 FORCE_CACHE_SHARING - Set thread affinity to run app and game within a shared cache.
0x00000200 FORCE_CACHE_SEPERATION Set thread affinity to run app and game on seperate caches.
0x00000400 FORCE_HT_SEPERATION - Set thread affinity to avoid running driver and app on one hyperthreads of one core.
0x00001000 - PLAYER_HTT_NO_OPTIIMIZE - This will disable HTT optimizations i.e. shifting threads around cores
0x00002000 PLAYER_HTT_RUN_AWAY_GROUP - When the player thread runs away, bind it to a group of cores. Otherwise, only choose a single core
0x00004000 PLAYER_HTT_RUN_AWAY_ONCE - If set, this means the player thread can only run away from the tokenizer thread once. Otherwise, it will constantly check
0x00008000 PLAYER_NO_VOTING_LOCK - Don't allow voting to dynamially lock the worker thread onto a core
0x00010000 ENABLE_QUADRO_DC - Turn on the DC driver on Quadro
0x00020000 FORCE_SYNC_VACACHE - Force a Sync on each BindVertexArray
0x00040000 DISABLE_TIMER - Disable front/backend timers normally used to disable threading when not effective
0x00080000 IGNORE_OCCLUSION - Ignore GetQuery for occlusion tests, always return TRUE
0x00100000 TRACK_CURRENT_COLOR - Track current color in the app thread to speed glGetFloat requests
0x00200000 TRACK_CURRENT_MVP_MATRIX - Track current MVP matrix in the app thread to speed glGetFloat requests
0x00400000 TRACK_CURRENT_FB_BINDING - Track current FB bindings to avoid syncs in glGetIntegerv
0x00800000 CONVERT_MAPBUFFERRANGE - Convert glMapBufFerRange/glUnmapBuffer sequences to glBufferSubData.
0x01000000 ASSUME_MAP_INVALIDATE - Assume that the app does not expect valid content when calling glMapBufferRange (as if GL_MAP_INVALIDATE_RANGE_BIT would be set by the app).
0x08000000 CACHE_VERTEXARRAYNAMES - Enable vertex array name cache
Enable - Disables automatic enable of some workstation optimizations
Enable - Remove Z16 pixelformats with stencil
Enable - Replaces some application immediate mode loops with block copy of data
Enabled - Optimize based on constant values
Enabled - Do accept opengl calls with HDCs created by another process than the current one
Enabled - Enable frame coherency assuming static data but with dynamic references
Enabled - Enable the optimizing compile in CLAW
Enabled - Maximize vidmem available for texture storage
Disable - Map the GL_RGBA4 texture format to GL_RGBA8 internally
Enable - Don't map the GL_RGBA4 texture format to GL_RGBA8 internally
Disabled - disables TXL LOD WAR for HW bug
Enabled - Avoid unnecessary calls to validation on pop matrix where no change has occurred. Limited to app bit to reduce risk

Default - Control the amount of freed video memory the allocator reserves for reuse by future allocations. By default the allocator reserves up to 10% of the total VRAM. The units are in 1/1000ths of total heap. So 100 means 10%
AUTOSELECT - Set the stereo mode based on the consumer stereo regkeys
LCD - Use a 3D Vision capable LCD
DLP - Use a 3D Vision capable DLP TV
DLP_REVERSED - Use a 3D Wsion capable DLP TV (reversed checkerboard)
HDMI14 - Use a HDMI 1.4 capable TV (3DTV Play)
AEGIS_DT - Use a 3D Vision capable LCD with embedded AegisDT emitter
OEM_EMITTER - Use a 3D Vision capable LCD with OEM emitter connected via GPIO
Enabled - In VirtualProtectWriteWatch, allow late allocations
Enabled - App uses shader that does rely on NV4x behaviour to automatically initializes shader variables
Enabled - This app benefits greatly from vidmem pushbuffers
USE_HW_DEFAULT - Select hardware default based on capabilities
Enabled - Enable splitting of large Display List (reduce memory peak consumption)
Enabled - Notify RM at each clear that pstates should be pushed to full power
CLAW_DISABLE - Disable the Workstation Performance Code, CLAW
NO_GENERIC_ARRAYS_IN_FF WAR - for apps that exploit old-style vertex array access bugs such as KOTOR2
PTE_COALESCING_DISABLE - Disable PTE coalescing, this fails in G8X and G9X chips
CLAW_DISABLE_DISPLAY_LIST - Disable the usage of CLAW in display lists
CONSTANT_OPTIMIZE - Optimize based on constant values
LAZY_VBUM_VBOS - Enable the Lazy VBUM optimization for VBOS

HIDE_FLOAT_COLOR_IF_NO_TWO_SIDED - Hide float color extensions (GL_ARB_color_buffer_float; GLX_ARB_fbconfig_float for X11,/GLX; WGL_ARB_pixel_format_float for Windows/WGL) if GPU resorts to software fallback possible due to lack of two—sided lighting support (only on NV4x/G7x)
VPWW_ALLOW_LATE_ALLOCED - In VirtualProtectWriteWatch, allow late allotions
HIDE_GL3_ON_G80_PLUS - When set, advertise OpenGL 2.1 for G80+ GPUs Gnstead of OpenGL 3.0)
DISABLE_TXL_LOD_WAR - disables TXL LOD WAR for HW bug
COPYPIXEL_FRONTBUFFER_FLUSH - Force a flush after copypixels to the front buffer
NVIEW_SPAN_PER_HEAD_FLIPPING - Allow flipping on one head in spanning mode when app is fullscreen on this head
MEMORY_MAP_NOT_REQUIRED - Disables the mapping of video memory to system memory, consumes too much in Vista
NO_PFD_SUPPORT_GDI - Final override for exporting PFD_SUPPORT_GDI. If this bit is set, PFD_SUPPORT_GDI will not be set, regardless of OGL_PfdAdjust or OGL_VistaControlFlags values
MOST _VISIBLE_PIXELS - client with most visible pixels
MODE_NO_SPANNING - client can not be in span mode
DONT_INVALIDATE_RECT_BEFORE_PRESENT - Don't call InvalidateRect before swapping
PRE_SWAP_WAIT - Wait on the HW flip event for frame N when swapbuffers is called for frame N+1
SYNC_SEMAPHORE - Create an overaly surface which will receive be the semaphore surface shared between KMD present blit and HW flip
Enable - Textures being promoted from Sysmem to Vidmem

Enabled - Hacks for broken NV3X demos on NV50 -- cap the number of exposed image units to 16 to avoid crashes, and clamp the position written by vertex programs because NV50 doesn't rasterize primitives with vertices at +/-INF
Q - (Default, Mixed mode) uses application detection
ATOC - (Old mode) uses the good old ATOC computation, 1x shader
A4X_TC - (Quality mode) spawns 4 shader copies, averages alpha only (only texcoords are adjusted)
C4X_TC - (Quality mode) spawns 4 shader copies, averages r,g,b, and alpha (only texcoords are adjusted)
A3X_TC - (Quality mode) spawns 3 shader copies, averages alpha only (only texcoords are adjusted)
C3X_TC - (Quality mode) spawns 3 shader copies, averages r,g,b, and alpha (only texcoords are adjusted)
A4X_ALL - (Quality mode) spawns 4 shader copies, averages alpha only (all parameters are adjusted)
C4X_ALL - (Quality mode) spawns 4 shader copies, averages r,g,b, and alpha (all parameters are adjusted)
A3X_ALL - (Quality mode) spawns 3 shader copies, averages alpha only (all parameters are adjusted)
C3X_ALL - (Quality mode) spawns 3 shader copies, averages r,g,b, and alpha (all parameters are adjusted)
SS2X - Used for internal driver purposes only - spawns 2 shader copies
SS4X - Used for internal driver purposes only - spawns 4 shader copies
SS8X - Used for internal driver purposes only - spawns 8 shader copies
TEST - (Test mode) shows shader types in different colors
MRT_ONLY - Enable only for MRT buckets
REMOVE_GENERICS_IN_PS_IMAP - Replace references to generic attributes in PS with an immediate zero
DISABLE_MINMAX - Disable min/max reduction and lookup
DISABLE_BITPACKING - Disable the bit-packing optimization for the contact-hardening shaders
DISABLE_BITPACKBRANCHING - Disable the bit-packing branching optimization for the contact-hardening shaders
DISABLE_DEPTHCONVERSION - Disable conversion of projected depth to match shadow map precision
DISABLE_CONVEXITY - Disable convexity reduction for SSAO shaders
DISABLE_ARBITRARY_VALUE - disable clears to any value other than 0 or 1
DISABLE_PER_COMPONENT_VALUE - disable (color) clears where all components do not match
DISABLE_LD_STRUCTURED_FOR_STRIDE_4 - Disables ld_structured->LDG conversion for stride multiples 4
DISABLE_LD_STRUCTURED_FOR_STRIDE_8 - Disables ld_structured->LDG conversion for stride multiples 8
DISABLE_LD_STRUCTURED_FOR_STRIDE_12 - Disables ld_structured->LDG conversion for stride multiples 12
DISABLE_LD_STRUCTURED_FOR_STRIDE_16 - Disables ld_structured->LDG conversion for stride multiples 16
DISABLE_PIXEL - Disables killing of PS outputs
DISABLE_VTG - Disables killing of VTG outputs and inputs
DISABLE_NULL_COLOR_TARGET - Disables killing of unbound/null color targets
DEMOTE_ABGR16F_TO_R11G11B10F - Demotes FP16 to R11G11B10F. Default rule is to do all tests.
DEMOTE_R11G11B10F_TO_RGBA8 - Demotes R11G11B10F surfaces to RGBA8. Default rule for this demotion is to skip all tests.
DEMOTE_SRGB_TO_RGB - Demotes SRGB surfaces to RGB. Default rule for this demotion is to skip all test.
DEMOTE_D32S8X24_TO_D32 - Demotes D32_S8X24 (8BPP) to D32 (4BPP / no stencil)
PROMOTE_RG8_TO_RGBA8 - Promotes RG8 to RGBA8. Default rule is to do all tests.
PROMOTE_RGBX8_TO_RGB10A2 - Promotes RGBX8 surfaces to RGB10A2. This is done on the DWM process when a 10 bits per component monitor is detected on Quadros
PROMOTE_RGBA8_TO_RGB10A2 - Promotes RGBA8 surfaces to RGB10A2. This is done on the DWM process when a 10 bits per component monitor is detected on Quadros
ALLOW_FACTORED_SIZES - If size is MxN, also substitute (M/2)x(N/2), (M/4)x(M/4), etc.
SKIP_RENDERTARGET_CHECK - Skip spoofing rendertargets. Spoofing rendertargets is used on the DWM process to support 10 bits per component rendering
ACCURATE_FULLSCREEN_CHECK - run VS in SW for accurate IsFullscreen check
ANALYSIS_ONLY - run fullscreen analysis, but don't force LateZ
TIER2_HEAP_PRIORITY_LOW - Tier 2 heaps may be used for any type of resource
INVALID_HEAP_BONUS_PRIORITY_MASK - Value times 0x1000 is added to the priority of this heap type. Bonus is added to surface placement's decision unless you also override with above values.
GREATER_THAN - Target upload heaps greater than PS_DX12_SURFACE_PLACEMENT_BAR1_SIZE
LESS_THAN - Target upload heaps less than PS_DX12_SURFACE_PLACEMENT_BAR1_SIZE

INCLUDE_SIZE_LIST - Target upload heaps with sizes found in PS_DX12_SURFACE_PLACEMENT_BAR1_HEURISTIC_LIST (each entry is a size in bytes). Example: PS_DX12_SURFACE_PLACEMENT_BAR1_HEURISTIC_LIST=0x400;0x5000;0x70000;0xF000;

EXCLUDE_SIZE_LIST - Target upload heaps without sizes found in PS_DX12_SURFACE_PLACEMENT_BAR1_HEURISTIC_LIST (each entry is a size in bytes). Example: PS_DX12_SURFACE_PLACEMENT_BAR1_HEURISTIC_LIST=0x400;0x5000;0x70000;0xF000;

TARGET_HEAP_ORDER - Target upload heaps by creation order found in PS_DX12_SURFACE_PLACEMENT_BAR1_HEURISTIC_LIST. Example: PS_DX12_SURFACE_PLACEMENT_BAR1_HEURISTIC_LIST=1;2;4;5; -> promote the 1st, 2nd, 4th, and 5th upload heap created
IGNORE_SYSTEM_CAPABILITIES - Ignore whether this system is BAR1 compatible (force on)
DISALLOW_GRID - Disallow BAR1 placement of upload heaps on GRID adapters (e.g. GFN)
DISALLOW_VGX - Disallow BAR1 placement of upload heaps on VGX environments (e.g. Xen/VMWare)
DISALLOW_SLI - Disallow BAR1 placement of upload heaps on SLI environments
IGNORE_SIZE_CLAMPING - Ignore whether NvSurfacePlacement clamps PS_DX12_SURFACE_PLACEMENT_BAR1_SIZE_LIMIT to the BAR1 size reported by the GPU
IGNORE_NVAPI_HINTS - Ignore Hints provided by NvAPI (useful for debugging)
AVOID_INTEL_PERF_BUG_3440153 - Disables BAR1 promotion when running on a problematic Intel chipset (AlderLake or RocketLake) due to a MMIO/DRAM contention issue. See bug 3440153 for more info
PUSHBUFFERS - Promote HOST allocs used by the pusher
DISABLE - Dont set DSC as default blitter
ENABLE_FOR_ALL_GPUS - enable DSC as default blitter on all GPUs
ENABLE_FOR_ALL_COPIES_ON_ASYNC_QUEUES - enable for async queues irrespective of size
DISABLE_SUBALLOCATION - DX9/DX10 (Vista only, for XP use NOSUBALLOC)
ALLOW_LARGE_SUBALLOCATION - DX9/DX10 Allow larger suballocation thresholds than MS wants
DISABLE_OFFER_SMALL_BLOCKS - DX9/DX10 Disable offering of suballocated Blocks
NO_BARRIER_HAZARD - Resource barriers don't contribute to being a hazard in a command list sequence (unsafe)
DM_16KB_STATIC - Sets L1=48KB, DM=16KB (in all applicable cases)
DM_16KB_DYNAMIC - Sets L1=48KB, DM=16KB (when applicable, but only according to perf heuristics)
DM_COMPUTE_DYNAMIC - Compute shared memory set automatically
DM_COMPUTE_48KB - Compute shared memory set to 48K
DM_COMPUTE_32KB - Compute shared memory set to 32K
DM_COMPUTE_16KB - Compute shared memory set to 16K
DM_VOLTA_COMPUTE_DYNAMIC - Compute shared memory set automatically (Volta Only!)
DM_VOLTA_COMPUTE_0KB - Compute shared memory set to 0K (Volta Only!)
DM_VOLTA_COMPUTE_8KB - Compute shared memory set to 8K (Volta Only!)
DM_VOLTA_COMPUTE_16KB - Compute shared memory set to 16K (Volta Only!)
DM_VOLTA_COMPUTE_32KB - Compute shared memory set to 32K (Volta Only!)
DM_VOLTA_COMPUTE_64KB - Compute shared memory set to 64K (Volta Only!)
DM_VOLTA_COMPUTE_96KB - Compute shared memory set to 96K (Volta+ Only!)
DM_VOLTA_COMPUTE_ENABLE_MAX - Sets Max SHMEM to max supported config for compute shaders that don't do LDG (Volta+ Only!)
DM_VOLTA_COMPUTE_ENABLE_MIN - Sets Min SHMEM to the bare minimum required to launch 1 CTA (Volta+ Only!)
DM_TURING_COMPUTE_DYNAMIC - Compute shared memory set automatically (Turing Only!)
DM_TURING_COMPUTE_32KB - Compute shared memory set to 32K (Turing Only!)
DM_TURING_COMPUTE_48KB - Compute shared memory set to 48K (Turing Only!)
DM_TURING_COMPUTE_64KB - Compute shared memory set to 64K (Turing Only!)
DM_AMPERE_COMPUTE_DYNAMIC - Compute shared memory set automatically (Ampere Only!)
DM_AMPERE_COMPUTE_0KB - Compute shared memory set to 0K (Ampere Only!)
DM_AMPERE_COMPUTE_8KB - Compute shared memory set to 8K (Ampere Only!)
DM_AMPERE_COMPUTE_16KB - Compute shared memory set to 16K (Ampere Only!)
DM_AMPERE_COMPUTE_32KB - Compute shared memory set to 32K (Ampere Only!)
DM_AMPERE_COMPUTE_64KB - Compute shared memory set to 64K (Ampere Only!)
DM_AMPERE_COMPUTE_100KB - Compute shared memory set to 100K (Ampere Only!)
DM_AMPERE_COMPUTE_132KB - Compute shared memory set to 132K (AmpereA (GA100) Only!)
DM_AMPERE_COMPUTE_164KB - Compute shared memory set to 164K (AmpereA (GA100) Only!)
LZ_COPY_ENABLED - Enable LZ compressed transfer (for PCIE 1-x systems)
LZ_COPY_FORCED - Force LZ compressed transfers whenever possible
ENABLE_DEFAULT_SHADER_SERIALIZATION - Enables serialization of the default shader code into the PSO library
USE_UM_FILEIO_IF_NO_KMD - Use user mode file create if no KMD present
USE_KMD_FILEIO - Only use KMD file create
USE_UM_FILEIO - Only use user mode file create
OS_EXIT_HOOKS_ON - Enable for TerminateProcess, ExitProcess, CrtExit
CLASS_NAME_TRACKING_ON - Enable to track names for ID3D11DeviceChild classes
TIMESTAMP_CHECK_ON - Enable to spew timestamp query information built from the D3D12 API
ECL_MERGING - Enable hooks necessary for merging ECL calls
DISABLE_MERGING - Don't perform any ECL merging, just allow dependency tracking
LOG_MULTIPLE_FRAMES - Pressing the hotkey is a start/stop switch for logging frames, instead of just logging one frame
BASIC_LOGGING - Log the ECL merging information into a file called NVECLDEPS.txt
ETW_LOGGING - Log all file events to ETW as well
FRAME_SUMMARIES - For each frame, record the 0
DECIDE_COUNTS - Basic Stats like how many calls to ask for IndexBuffers we got. How many were rejected, how many below threshold etc..
DUMP_INDICES - Dumps indices in all index buffers for which Decide is called (basically all of them), the sizes, and strides to a file c:\\IBList.txt.
ALLOW_HARDWARE - Hardware index buffers can be generally used for any primitive and partial index buffers. Disabled on certain NV4X BR02 parts.
ALLOW_CALLRET - Call/Return index buffers. Only kicks in for triangle primitives where the whole index buffer is invoked (a common case.)
VER_0 - Old version of COPArgs with ATTRIBINDEXABLEBLOCKID, RESULTINDEXABLEBLOCKID
VER_1 - This is the current version parsed by parseasm.
VER_2 - This version has additional sampler and texture properties, and isn't currently handled by parseasm.
VER_COMPAT - This option is temporary - this settings specifies the use the old driver based code for dumping COPArgs, rather than common code.
VER_UNKNOWN - This value is for use by the parser as it tries to figure out what version of the dump it is dealing with.
DUMP_HEX_SPH - Dump hex version of Shader Program Header
DELETE_EMPTY_DUMP_FILES - If a psdbgXXX/statsXXX.txt file has no shaders associated with it, delete it (cruft reduction).
DUMP_HEX_UCODE - Dump hex dump of the ucode rather than disassembly
DUMP_DX_RUNTIME_HASH_IN_SUMMARY - Dump the DX runtime hash in the shader summary instead of the token hash
DUMP_JSON_OUTPUT - Dump a JSON-formatted file (shaderinfoXXX.json) alongside the normal shader dump
DUMP_ANNOTATED_NVINST - same as DUMP_NVINST but injects D3DIL comments
DUMP_SHADER_USE_PCSAMPLER_FOR_USAGE - Use the PCSAMPLER hit counts instead of the normal usage.
DUMP_ANNOTATED_NVINST - same as DUMP_NVINST but injects D3DIL comments
DUMP_SHADER_USE_PCSAMPLER_FOR_USAGE - Use the PCSAMPLER hit counts instead of the normal usage.
DUMP_ANNOTATED_NVINST - same as DUMP_NVINST but injects D3DIL comments
DUMP_SHADER_USE_PCSAMPLER_FOR_USAGE - Use the PCSAMPLER hit counts instead of the normal usage.
DUMP_ANNOTATED_NVINST - same as DUMP_NVINST but injects D3DIL comments
DUMP_SHADER_USE_PCSAMPLER_FOR_USAGE - Use the PCSAMPLER hit counts instead of the normal usage.
DUMP_ANNOTATED_NVINST - same as DUMP_NVINST but injects D3DIL comments
DUMP_SHADER_USE_PCSAMPLER_FOR_USAGE - Use the PCSAMPLER hit counts instead of the normal usage.
DUMP_ANNOTATED_NVINST - same as DUMP_NVINST but injects D3DIL comments
DUMP_SHADER_USE_PCSAMPLER_FOR_USAGE - Use the PCSAMPLER hit counts instead of the normal usage.
ENABLE_LOG - log will be saved to PS_FILE_PATH path
DUMP_HEX_UCODE - Dump hex dump of the ucode rather than disassembly
DUMP_ELF_SECTIONS - Dump the ELF file sections associated with the pipeline
DUMP_ELF_SECTION_CONTENTS - Dump the ELF file section contents but not ucode associated with a pipeline
DUMP_ELF_SECTION_UCODE - Dump the ELF file ucode associated with a pipeline
DELAY_UNTIL_HOTKEY_THEN_CAPTURE_SINGLE_FRAME_THEN_EXIT - hotkey mode: capture a single frame starting with SCROLL_LOCK + auto-exit
DELAY_UNTIL_HOTKEY_THEN_CAPTURE_UNTIL_HOTKEY_THEN_EXIT - hotkey mode: capture a multiple frames starting with SCROLL_LOCK + wait for second press + auto-exit
ENABLE_OPTIMIZER - Allow the pixel shader optimizer
APP_DETECT - Alter the opt level for specific apps
LOAD_BALANCE - Attempt to load balance compilation
COP_HIGH - higher than default (likely for offline)
COP_MAX - the most we will optimize (likely for offline)
DISABLE_DRIVER_SHADERS - Disable replacement with custom shaders built into driver
DISABLE_INVARIANT_CONST_DETECTION - debug: Disable profiling logic which detects invariant consts
DISABLE_INVARIANT_CONST_FOLDING - debug: Run profiling logic to detect invariant consts, but don't fold them in
DISABLE_GLOBAL_CB_FOLDING - debug: Disable folding on the global CB (DX10+ only, both compute and pixel)
DISABLE_NVINST_UNROLLING - debug: Disable unrolling of 3dmv loops (DX10-only)
DISABLE_FLOAT_CONST_DETECTION - Disable support for floating-point constants
DISABLE_BOOL_CONST_DETECTION - Disable support for boolean constants
DISABLE_INT_CONST_DETECTION - Disable support for integer constants
DISABLE_VERTEX_SHADER - disable support for vertex shader type
DISABLE_HULL_SHADER - disable support for hull shader type
DISABLE_DOMAIN_SHADER - disable support for domain shader type
DISABLE_GEOMETRY_SHADER - disable support for geometry shader type
DISABLE_PIXEL_SHADER - disable support for pixel shader type
DISABLE_COMPUTE_SHADER - disable support for compute shader type
ENABLED_FOR_SHADER_HASHES - Enable CFGPU for specific shader hashes only
ENABLED_ALWAYS_WITH_PERFSTRAT_SCG - Enable CFGPU if we have perfstrat SCG
ENABLED_ALWAYS_WITH_EXECUTE_SHADER - Enable CFGPU if we have the execute shader
USE_LOADBALANCE_SCORE - Use the load balancer score
ENABLED_FOR_SHADER_HASHES - Enable CFGPU for specific shader hashes only
ENABLED_ALWAYS_WITH_PERFSTRAT_SCG - Enable CFGPU if we have perfstrat SCG
ENABLED_ALWAYS_WITH_EXECUTE_SHADER - Enable CFGPU if we have the execute shader
USE_LOADBALANCE_SCORE - Use the load balancer score
ENABLED_FOR_SHADER_HASHES - Enable CFGPU for specific shader hashes only
ENABLED_ALWAYS_WITH_PERFSTRAT_SCG - Enable CFGPU if we have perfstrat SCG
ENABLED_ALWAYS_WITH_EXECUTE_SHADER - Enable CFGPU if we have the execute shader
USE_LOADBALANCE_SCORE - Use the load balancer score
ENABLED_FOR_SHADER_HASHES - Enable CFGPU for specific shader hashes only
ENABLED_ALWAYS_WITH_DRIVER_SCG - Enable CFGPU if we have driver SCG
ENABLED_FOR_SHADER_HASHES - Enable CFGPU for specific shader hashes only
ENABLED_ALWAYS_WITH_DRIVER_SCG - Enable CFGPU if we have driver SCG
ENABLED_FOR_SHADER_HASHES - Enable CFGPU for specific shader hashes only
ENABLED_ALWAYS_WITH_DRIVER_SCG - Enable CFGPU if we have driver SCG
DEBUG_NULL_OPTIMIZED_SHADER - do nothing in the optimized case (see if it's actually being picked)
DEBUG_SKIP_SELECTION_SHADER - don't run the selection or patch shaders
DEBUG_SKIP_HISTOGRAM_SHADER - don't run the histogram, selection or patch shaders
DEBUG_ALLOW_IN_REPLAY_MODE - allow CFGPU to operate in replay mode (not really supported)
DEBUG_SKIP_TIER3_SAFETY_CHECKS - assume all resources bound for all shaders
DEBUG_SKIP_INVALID_RANGES - don't attempt to skip invalid ranges from resource barriers
ENABLE_HISTOGRAM_SLOT_NEW_PASS - trigger a new pass when we run out of histogram slots
ENABLE_SELECTION_SLOT_NEW_PASS - trigger a new pass when we run out of selection slots
DISABLE_LOADBALANCE_ON_HAZARD - disable loadbalanced shader types when we hit a perfstrat SCG hazard
ENABLE_LOW_LATENCY - reduce the frame/phase thresholds to the minimum possible (speed up amodel/emulation runs)
DEBUG_SKIP_PATCH_SHADER - don't run the patch shader
DISABLE_FOR_DISPATCH_INDIRECT - disable opt for indirect compute shaders
GATHER_FALLBACK_STATS - count draw/dispatch calls that hit the optimized vs. fallback case
GATHER_ANALYSIS_SHADER_TIMES - measure the time spent on the analysis shaders
GATHER_PROFILE_DATA - profile cycle counts of the analysis shaders
DISABLE_CORE_DISPATCH_FOR_DX11 - Disable core dispatch QMD allocations on pre-DX12 devices
DISABLE_CORE_DISPATCH_FOR_DX11_AUTO_SCG - Disable core dispatch QMD allocations on pre-DX12 devices with Auto SCG
DISABLE_CORE_DISPATCH_FOR_DX11_AUTO_SCG_SLI - Disable core dispatch QMD allocations on pre-DX12 devices with Auto SCG and SLI
DEBUG_TRACK_COUNTER_VALUES - Use NOP methods to track counter values
DEBUG_TRACK_CORE_DISPATCH_QMDS - Use the second QMD semaphore to track completion of core QMDs
DEBUG_TRACK_DISPATCH_HELPER_QMDS - Use the second QMD semaphore to track completion of dispatch helper QMDs
DISABLE_COMPUTE_QUEUE_TIMESTAMPS - Disable compute queue timestamp tracking
DISABLE_DIRECT_QUEUE_TIMESTAMPS - Disable direct queue timestamp tracking
DISABLE_DEFAULT_PSO_ASYNC_COMPILE - Disable asynchronous creation of default PipelineStateObjects
DISABLE_OPTIONAL_PSO_ASYNC_COMPILE - Disable asynchronous creation of optional PipelineStateObjects
DISABLE_DEFAULT_SO_ASYNC_COMPILE - Disable asynchronous creation of default StateObjects
COMPILE_IMMEDIATELY - Stall in the driver thread until the compile result arrives
DISABLE_BACKGROUND_PROCESSING_CAPS - Sets the caps bit for background processing support to false, D3D12DDICAPS_TYPE_D3D12_OPTIONS::BackgroundProcessingSupported.
FORCE_NV_THREADS - Forces the perfstrat to use NvGenericThreadUtils as its thread pool.
USE_SPINLOOP_TASKS - Fill the task queue with low priority spinloop tasks
MASK_TASK_TYPE - Bit mask, do not apply this setting
USE_NO_REQUEUE - Debug tasks return NO_REQUEUE, requeuing manually in advanceFrame()
MASK_REQUEUE_TYPE - Bit mask, do not apply this setting
DISABLE_CONST_BANK_PRIORITY_REMAPPING - Disable constant buffer remapping based on sorted priority (occurs even when some slots must be emulated)
DBGPRINT_DECISIONS - [debug] print decisions to the debugger
LOG_DECISIONS - [debug] log the decision making process to a file
DIRTY_DST - [debug] dirty the copy dest to expose obvious bugs
TOGGLE_ONOFF - [debug] toggle on/off every two frames
DISABLE_LOAD_BALANCED_DRAW_ANALYSIS - analyze draw calls even when cpu bound
DISABLE_LOAD_BALANCED_BLIT_ANALYSIS - analyze blit calls even when cpu bound
DONT_PROMOTE_DEPTH_DRAWS_TO_TWOD - don't promote depth copy draw calls to TWOD
DISABLE_PROFILES - Use for all SB slots of all eligible shaders
DONT_DEFER_HS_DS_GS_SET_STATE - don't defer/optimize tess+geometry set state calls
BREAK_ON_GENERATE_FAILURE - All uses of GENERATE_FAILURE macros
TRIGGER_UMD_ASSERT - Do user mode assertion (int3), will generate UDUMP in automation
TRIGGER_BUGCHECK - Do kernel mode exception, will generate KDUMP in automation
OFF - No resizing will occur. Use this mode when manually setting the size via PS_WARP_PROFILER_SEGMENTS
SINGLE_FRAME - The profiler will attempt to resize only once and stop. Use this mode for APIC-type scenarios
MULTI_FRAME - The profiler will attempt to resize every PS_WARP_PROFILER_NUM_RESIZE_FRAMES. Use this mode for in-game/benchmark scenarios
ON - Use version with better performance
OFF - Only apply reduction hack to buckets which pass the strategy criteria
ON - Apply reduction hack to every recompileable PS
SINGLE_SHADER_OBJECT - Profile each single shader object (either pixel or compute)
ALL_SHADER_OBJECT - Profile each unique shader bucket
PER_BUCKET_STATE_CHANGES - Tracks strategy state over time
PER_BUCKET_PROFILING - Tracks performance over time. ~5k frames to complete. Modify PROFILING_INTERVAL to speed up.
DISABLE_WARPS_PER_SUBTILE - Disables schmoo over warps per subtile (2,4,8)
DISABLE_REDUCTION_HACK - Disables schmoo over reduction hack (off,on)
DISABLE_WARP_THROTTLE - Disables schmoo over warp throttle (20,16,8.4)
DISABLE_REG_COUNT - Disables schmoo over regcount (0, 63) - Dependent on warp throttle
DISABLE_COLOR_CLEAR_TRACKING - do not program HW with any dynamic ZBC color values [the 'default zero' slot may still be used]
DISABLE_DEPTH_CLEAR_TRACKING - do not program HW with any dynamic ZBC depth values [the 'default zero' slot may still be used]
DISABLE_STENCIL_CLEAR_TRACKING - Pascal_B, do not program HW with any dynamic ZBC stencil values [the 'default zero' slot may still be used]
DISABLE_COLOR_ZBC - completely disable ZBC for color targets [via PRI: NV_PGRAPH_PRI_DS_DEBUG_ZBC_EN]
DISABLE_DEPTH_ZBC - completely disable ZBC for depth targets [via PRI: NV_PGRAPH_PRI_DS_DEBUG_ZBC_EN]
DISABLE_STENCIL_ZBC - Pascal_B, completely disable ZBC for stencil targets [via PRI: NV_PGRAPH_PRI_GPCS_SWDX_DSS_ROP_DEBUG2_STENCIL_ZBC_EN]
CONSUMER_OPTIMIZE_FOR_TLD4 - Codegen optimized for TLD4 vectorization
CONSUMER_COMPARE_HEADER_POOL_INDICES - Compare header pool indices instead of all header dwords
USE_CODEGEN_HINTS - Use slot-specific codegen hints. Tilemap kernel verifies if these hold true dynamically. Consumer codegen is specialized for these settings.
TMKERNEL_ENABLE_TILE_PER_THREAD_SUM - Enable summarization on a tile per thread basis
TMKERNEL_ENABLE_PRE_SUM_KERNEL - Run pre summarization in a dedicated pass which forces tileMapKernel as a dispatch Indirect path
ENABLE_VA_RANGE_TRACKING - Enable VA Range Tracking in TMKERNEL and consumer shader
PREFER_PLC_FOR_ALL_PAGES - Ask KMD to disable PLC WAR by opting into PLC for all pages
CONSUMER_MEMOIZE_INITS - Enable memoization of initialization results in pixel shader consumers (CS'es get constExpr)
DISABLE_CONSUMER_CODEGEN - Debug knob to disable consumer shader transforms.
OPTIMIZE_FOR_ALLCLEAN_TILES - Tilemap kernel and consumer changes to optimize for fully clean SRVs. Each lookup has 3 paths: allClean, clean after STM lookup, or dirty.
CONSUMER_ALLCLEAN_OR_DIRTY - Codegen option to make each lookup have only 2 paths: allClean or dirty (effective only when OPTIMIZE_FOR_ALLCLEAN_TILES is set).
TMKERNEL_ENABLE_SHMEMOPT_FOR_LINEAR_FILTER - Apply shared mem opt while constructing tilemap of a linear filtered texture
CONSUMER_CODE_SPECIALIZE_FOR_ZEROS - Enable code specialization if clean value is zero and used in a multiply or similar op
CONSUMER_CHECK_TILEMAP_READINESS - Check tilemap readiness with an explicit global load in the consumer. If not set, readiness guaranteed implicitly through QMD semaphore synchronization.
TMKERNEL_ENABLE_SUQUERY_PER_THREAD_SUM - enable suquery parallelization summarization aka each query tile is issued per thread instead of tile(which may consist several query tiles) per thread
TMKERNEL_LOOP_OVER_TEXSLOTS - loop over texslots with fewer CTAs per grid (for all chosen kernels)
GATHER_PROFILE_DATA - Profile tilemap data in both construction kernel and consumer shader
CONSUMER_DYNAMIC_COUNTS - Track dynamic counts of clean and total lookups (could TDR due to atomic overhead). Otherwise, default is static count. Effective only when GATHER_PROFILE_DATA is set.
CONSUMER_PMTRIGS - Enable pmtrigger generation in consumer to record dynamic lookup events (total and clean counts)
DISABLE_SLOT0 - Disable slot 0 of static specification for debugging purposes.
DISABLE_SLOT1 - Disable slot 1 of static specification for debugging purposes.
DISABLE_SLOT2 - Disable slot 2 of static specification for debugging purposes.
DISABLE_SLOT3 - Disable slot 3 of static specification for debugging purposes.
DISABLE_SLOT4 - Disable slot 4 of static specification for debugging purposes.
DISABLE_SLOT5 - Disable slot 5 of static specification for debugging purposes.
DISABLE_SLOT6 - Disable slot 6 of static specification for debugging purposes.
ENABLE_LOG_FILE - gpu dumps need fileIO / syscalls don't
ENABLE_SHADER_DEBUG_DATA - map PC to function name, ucode and annotate with d3dasm/nvvm
ENABLE_DEBUG_PRINTF - output gpu dumps/etc to debugger, too
DUMP_SM_ERRORS - enables SM exception logging / else ignore errors
DUMP_ONLY_FIRST_FAULTY_WARP - report first warp with SM exceptions / the other thousands are likely dupes
ENABLE_TOAST_NOTIFICATION_ON_SM_ERROR - show window toast notification whenever SM crashed
ENABLE_COMMAND_TIMING - measure how long commands take
ENABLE_LVL_1_MINIMAL - ==1 minimize the amount of captured state
STATIC_PIXEL_SHADERS - Allow replacement with static pixel shaders
STATIC_VERTEX_SHADERS - Allow replacement with static vertex shaders
STATIC_GEOMETRY_SHADERS - Allow replacement with static geometry shaders
DYNAMIC_SHADERS - Allow replacement with dynamic shaders (any type)
STATIC_HULL_SHADERS - Allow replacement with static hull shaders
STATIC_DOMAIN_SHADERS - Allow replacement with static domain shaders
STATIC_COMPUTE_SHADERS - Allow replacement with static compute shaders
DYNAMIC_SHADER_COLLECTIONS - Allow replacement of shader collections from a file
MATCH_UCODE_HASH - Replace a shader with a particular ucode hash
DBGPRINT - [debug] Print operational data to the debugger
NO_THRESHOLD - Share all shareable surfaces, regardless of size
ENABLE_LOW_LATENCY - Reduces warmup time to the minimum possible. Won't work for the 3DMark app, but useful for APIC.
ALLOW_STATIC_HAND_TUNED - Permits hand tuned static shaders to be used
ALLOW_DYNAMIC_HAND_TUNED - Permits dynamic hand tuned shaders to be used
ALLOW_REJECT_CULL_NONE - Don't process prims with cull mode NONE
ALLOW_BBOX_ONLY_CULL - Allow doing BBox-only testing for overly large draws
ALLOW_USE_ASM - Use the assembler cull functions
ALLOW_ONLY_FRUSTUM - Only do frustum cull, no backface
ALLOW_DXT3TO1_ONPSHAD - Permits DXT3->DXT1 conversion if pixel shader does not use alpha
FORCE_DXT3TO1_ONPSHAD - Forces DXT3->DXT1 conversion regardless of whether pixel shader uses alpha
ALLOW_DXT3TO1_ONBLT_DEFAULT_ALPHA - Permits DXT3->DXT1 conversion if the DXT3 texture only has 0xFF as alpha value

ALLOW_DXT3TO1_ONBLT_ANYALPHA - Permits DXT3->DXT1 conversion if the DXT3 texture only has one alpha value regardless of what the alpha value is. This option will add an instruction to the pixel shader if the alpha value if not 0xFF.
ALLOW_DXT5TO1_ONPSHAD - Permits DXT5->DXT1 conversion if pixel shader does not use alpha
FORCE_DXT5TO1_ONPSHAD - Forces DXT5->DXT1 conversion regardless of whether pixel shader uses alpha
ALLOW_DXT5TO1_ONBLT_DEFAULT_ALPHA - Permits DXT5->DXT1 conversion if the DXT3 texture only has 0xFF as alpha value

ALLOW_DXT5TO1_ONBLT_ANYALPHA - Permits DXT5->DXT1 conversion if the DXT5 texture only has one alpha value regardless of what the alpha value is. This option will add an instruction to the pixel shader if the alpha value if not 0xFF.
ALLOW_ARGBTODXT5 - Permits A8R8G8B8 to DXT5 conversion in some apps. Right now that would seem to be just 3dMark03 GT1.
ALLOW_CUBEMAP_DXTATO1 - BY default all the Allow&Force DXTA->DXT1 keys only apply to non-cube-maps. Setting this bit enables them to apply to cube-maps as well.
ZC_DX12_DISABLE_SHADER_HEURISTICS - Don't use shader heuristics; instead, base setup on clear direction
DUMP_LOG_TO_FILE - dump all perfstrat decisions to a file
DUMP_LOG_TO_DEBUGGER - dump all perfstrat decisions to the debugger
FAVOR_COLOR - During reallocation, favor color over Z
IGNORE_CONTENTS - Ignore the fact that a buffer to reallocate may have contents
VERTEXBUFFER - Object is a vertex buffer. Use PS_CATALOG_ID to specify the specific ID.
VERTEXSHADER - Object is a vertex shader. Use PS_CATALOG_ID to specify the specific ID.
PIXELSHADER - Object is a pixel shader. Use PS_CATALOG_ID to specify the specific ID.
TEXTURE - Object is a texture. Use PS_CATALOG_ID to specify the specific ID.
TRILINEAR - Object uses trilinear filtering. Use PS_CATALOG_ID to specify the specific ID.
INDEXBUFFER - Object is an index buffer. Use PS_CATALOG_ID to specify the specific ID.
PS_TEXFILTER - Object has had its aniso adjusted by PS_TEXFILTER. Use PS_CATALOG_ID to specify the specific ID.
DONOTHING - Disables the object ID code. (This is the default)
NORENDER - Do not render the object specified by PS_CATALOG_OBJECT and PS_CATALOG_ID, but render everything else.
BLINK - Switch between rendering and non-rendering of the object so that it blinks.
ONLYRENDER - Only draw the specified object, and nothing else.
BREAK - Breakpoint (int 3) when the specified object is rendered.
VBINFO - Print a list of VBs, their size, stride, associated pixel shaders, vertex shaders, textures and texture formats.
VBSIZES - Just print a list of the VBs and their sizes.
VBTABLE - Similar to VBSizes but mainly for DEBUG. Used with the App identification code.
HOTSPOTS - Randomly sample IP to determine the functions being executed often.
RELMSECTHRESHOLD - CPU_THRESHOLD is relative to previous frame instead of absolute. (To be removed in the future.)
STATIC_STATS - Report instructions retired and CPI for each CPU.
DONOTDUMP2FILE - Don't dump log to a file.
DUMP2DEBUGGER - Dump log to debug output.
SUM_INDIVIDUAL_CPUS - Sum hot spot data for all CPUs and report that.
ADVANCE_ON_CLIENT_PRESENT - use client thread/app's present() to trigger a new frame
USE_LARGE_BUFFER - use a 64MB capture buffer (for multi second frames), default is 4MB
IGNORESYMBOLS - Don't load symbols for modules. Only report module level data.
DONOTPROFILEUSERMODE - Only profile kernel mode modules.
SHOWHITCOUNT - Show raw hit counts in addition to percentages.
DUMPOVERHEAD - Report CPU overhead of cyclestats.
REFCOUNT_WAIT - begin/end of any wait on refcount
SUPERTRI - begin/end of super tri processing
ASYNCDEVICEWAIT - markers for AsyncDevice thread semaphores
FORCE_HIGH_FREQUENCY_MODE - high frequency (per decision) mode as opposed to traditional (per command buffer or so) mode
PER_FRAME_LOGFILE - generates a new dump file for every frame
DO_NOT_DECODE_METHODS - do not decode methods into plain text
FORCE_COHERENT_PB_GP - force pushbuffer/gpfifo entries to be allocated in coherent sysmem (avoids slow uncached reads)
FORCE_NO_SUBROUTINES - force inlining of pre-compiled methods (otherwise they will be missing)
WFI_ONLY - dump only wfi/context switch information, rather than the whole pushbuffer
FLUSH_FILE - synchronous file I/O and flush file after each write
IGNORE_SPLIT_POINTS - ingore split points: no split points, no flushes
ON - Ignore app/runtime calls to WriteBufferImmediate
DISABLED - Compute MME is not supported on GA10x+
ENABLED - Compute MME is supported on GA10x+
DISABLED - Compute MME backing store content is not initialized to known state
ENABLED - Clears the compute MME backing store to known state (say 0xffffff) on create
SIGNAL_PCAS - Disable MME macro that pushes PCAS A/B methods in non-iq2m fallback path
FILTER_SETDESCRIPTORHEAP_METHODS - Disable MME macro that filter redundant SetTexHeader/Sampler pool VA methods
SAVE_RESTORE_MME_ON_FE1 - Disable Save-Restore macros that get injected on compute VEID switches on FE1
COPY_GSCSECTIONS_TO_GSCB - Disable MME macro that uploads few global shader constants like texheader pool VA into ComputestateCB and fallback to i2m path
POLL_FOR_DATARAM_REUSE - Disable MME macro that polls to check if DataRam can be overwritten by next dispatch without corrupting earlier one
FORCE_OFF - Blacklist this app for OS VRR
USE_REDUCE_COVERAGE_DISABLE - This will trigger a launch check so it's not the default behavior
16x_custom - Enable 16x custom pattern mode (which is same as standard pattern) - so setting this has no effect.
SAMPLES_FROM_FILE - Do not use our default patterns but get the sample positions from a file specified in MAXWELL_B_FRAME_SAMPLE_POSITION_INTERLEAVE_PATH
DISABLE_ON_SQUARE_TARGETS - Disable the effect on square rendertargets, the rationale being they might be used to encode shadow maps
DISABLE_DITHERING - Some games are incompatible with a sample pattern that varies per pixel position. So disable this for this game

DECOMPRESS_DEPTH_ON_TEXTURE_READ - L2 from texture is unable to interpret non standard sample positions for depth, so we need to decompress them on the fly before that texture read happens. No need to enable if corruption is not visible.
DISABLE_ON_BLACK_LISTED_RATIOS - Disable the effect on rendertargets/z-buffers of certain ratios (1:1, 2:1, 3:1, 4:1, 1:2, 1:3 and 1:4), the rationale being they might be used to encode shadow maps

ALLOW_ONLY_ON_WHITELISTED_RATIOS - Enable the effect only on surfaces that are of the same aspect ratio as the backbuffer. This can be used to avoid applying interleaving on shadowmaps for games where DISABLE_ON_BLACK_LISTED_RATIOS doesn't work.

ALLOW_ON_BIGGER_THAN_BACK_BUFFER - when ALLOW_ONLY_ON_WHITELISTED_RATIOS is set, by default interleaving is disabled on surfaces bigger than the backbuffer. Set this key to enable it for such surfaces that have same aspect ratio as backbuffer but are bigger. This setting has no effect if ALLOW_ONLY_ON_WHITELISTED_RATIOS isn't set.
IGNORE_APP_PROFILE - if MAXWELL_B_SAMPLE_INTERLEAVE is ON and there is no app profile associated with the current executable, apply the effect nonetheless, used for testing purpose

PATCH_ATTRIBUTE_EVAL_OFFSETS - Always evaluating the attributes at pixel center causes corruptions with some games when run with MFAA and without MSAA. Setting this bit causes the driver to replace all IPA instructions with IPA.offset when the shader is used without MSAA which ensures the attribute evaluation happens at the same location as the jittered raster sample position.
DEFAULT_FILTER - simple 4 frames based algorithm only applied on static objects
SPATIAL_FILTER - Additional to default filter, spatial filter on moving objects
DEINTERLACE_FILTER - Special de-interlacing filter espicially designed for 1x->2x mode
FILTER_FROM_FILE - Load custom filter from file (available only on debug/develop drivers). File named tsfshader.bin should be placed in the path specificed by MAXWELL_B_SAMPLE_INTERLEAVE_PATH.
ENABLE - Enable only for whitelisted GUIDs. Eg: NvStreamer FBC GUID
FORCE_ENABLE - Force enable for any FBC session, even for non-whitelisted GUIDs
ALLOW - Allows LOW Latency VSync (Fast Sync). Set this bit to 0 for blacklisting the app.
BLEND - Enable Blending. Might result in slightly higher latency but smoother animation. Use LOW_LATENCY_BLEND_FACTOR to control blending factor.
DYNAMIC_FPS_CAP - Enable Dynamic fps limit to cap to a multiple of refresh rate.
COLLAPSE_FLIP - Enable Display hardware's collapseFlip mechanism to pick the latest rendered frame.
PS_FORCE_REG_ALLOC_POLICY - Force the PS register allocation policy instead of using a heuristic
DISABLE - Disable specialization for all shaders
NULL_SPECIALIZATION_HANDLE - Force the specialization handle (from rtcPipelineSpecializationGetHandle) to null
SKIP_APPLY_DEPENDENCIES - Skip the shader modification step (applyDependencies)
DEFAULT_SHADER_TRACE - Trace default shader compilation activity
OPTIONAL_SHADER_TRACE - Trace optional shader compilation activity
OUTOFORDER_TRACE - Trace Out-of-Order calls from the AsyncDevice
DUMP_TO_DEBUGGER - Dump output to debugger instead of file (deprecated)
SPARSE_STATS - List only frames with activity in the stats file
ENABLE_ON_DWM - Enable stutterstats collection on DWM/Explorer
ALL_ALLOC - Dump allocation/deallocation data relating to color targets
HW_ALLOC - Dump allocation/deallocation data relating to hardware resources(primarily RTs/ZBs)
INSTANCE_WORKING_SET - Dump the working set for various calls
COMPRESSION_WORKING_SET - DEPRECATED (in favor of INSTANCE_WORKING_SET): Dump the compression working set for each draw call.
FRAME_WORKING_SET - Dump the memory footprint bound for each frame.
WARNINGS_PER_FRAME - Dump a log of per frame perf warning details.
WARNINGS_GLOBAL - Dump a summary log of perf warnings encountered.
WARNINGS_PER_DRAW - Dump a summary log of perf warnings encountered per draw call.
QMD_HEAP - Dump a log of QMD allocations in the DCHEAP
QMD_HISTOGRAM - Dump a log of QMD size histograms
BENCHMARK_SYSTEM - Dump a log containing system benchmark data.
INCLUDE_DRAW - Dump working set for all draw calls
INCLUDE_CLEAR - Dump working set for all clear calls
INCLUDE_RESOLVE - Dump working set for all resolve calls
INCLUDE_COPY - Dump working set for all copy calls
INCLUDE_UPDATE - Dump working set for all update calls
INCLUDE_MAP - Dump working set for all map calls
INCLUDE_PRESENT - Dump working set for all present calls
INCLUDE_DISPATCH - Dump working set for all dispatch calls
INCLUDE_DEBUG_STATE - Dump driver debug state for all calls
INCLUDE_NON_RENDERABLE - Include non-renderables (e.g. vertex buffers, non-rendertarget textures)
TIMING_DATA - Dump timing information for KMI and other calls
DISABLE_MME_RESOLVE_D3D11 - Fallback to CPU resolution of tex-sampler pairs for D3D11
DISABLE_MME_RESOLVE_D3D12 - Fallback to CPU resolution of tex-sampler pairs for D3D11
DISABLE_MME_RESOLVE_D3D11_ON_KEPLER - Fallback to CPU resolution of tex-sampler pairs for D3D11
DISABLE_MME_RESOLVE_D3D12_ON_KEPLER - Fallback to CPU resolution of tex-sampler pairs for D3D11
OFF - Disable refactoring shaders by default
DIRECT - Pass DXIL directly to compiler
DBG_FLUSH_PIPELINE - Queries, predication, syncronization between pipelines (semaphores)
OFF - The optimization is turned off
NO_CLIP_PLANE_CHANGES - Disable the optimization for N frames when a frame is encountered for which there is a transition in the number of clipplanes used when rendering to a non-flip target.

ALLOW_0TO1_TRANSITION - Similar to strict except that we permit a transition from 0 to 1 clip planes used within the frame. No other transitions allowed or the strategy is disabled for the next N frames.
DISABLE_FLOAT_PIXEL_KILLS - float pixel kills (suppression of destination writes when SrcCoeff == 0.0)
DISABLE_ZERO_TIMES_ANYTHING_IS_ZERO - Zero times anything is zero (suppression of destination reads when DstCoeff == 0.0)
DISABLE_BLENDOPT_IN_SHADER - kill pixels with color/alpha not affecting final blended image in shader
DISABLE_ALPHATEST_IN_SHADER - kill pixels with an alpha that will fail the alpha test (DX9 only)
DISABLE_ROUNDING_IN_BLENDOPT - Disables the addition/subtraction of a delta value when comparing alpha/color for kill
DISABLE_EARLY_OUT_ALPHA_TEST - Disable early-out on alpha sources
DISABLE_HW_ALPHA_TEST_WITH_ALPHATEST_IN_SHADER - Disable HW alpha test when using in-shader alpha test
DISABLE_HW_BLENDOPT - Disable blendopts in HW (unconditionally) (DX10 only)
DISABLE_DEPTH_STENCIL_WRITE_CHECK_FOR_BLENDOPT - Apply blendopt even if depth/stencil writes are enabled
DISABLE_API_MANDATED_EARLYZ_FOR_BLENDOPT - Don't set API-mandated EarlyZ when blendopt is applied
DISABLE_RENDERTARGET_FORMAT_CHECK_FOR_BLENDOPT - Disable pseudo-64 rendertarget format check for blendopt
SKIP_TEXTURE_ANALYSIS - don't even attempt to analyze modulation textures
OFF - Disabled, allow EARLYZ when aliased rendering to MSAA render target
ON - Enabled (default), force LATEZ when aliased rendering to MSAA render target
OFF - Disabled (default), do not increase MaxOutputVertexCount
ON - Enabled, increase MaxOutputVertexCount as needed for optimal perf
DISALLOW_RENDER_TARGETS - Do not allow Render Targets in HEAP_CACHED
DISALLOW_DEPTH_STENCILS - Do not allow Depth Stencils in HEAP_CACHED
DISALLOW_UAVS - Do not allow Unordered Access Views in HEAP_CACHED
DISABLE_PIXEL_SHADER_ATOM - Disable general atomic optimizations for pixel shaders
DISABLE_PIXEL_SHADER_SUATOM - Disable surface atomic optimizations for pixel shaders
DISABLE_PIXEL_SHADER_ALLOC_SHFL - Disable SHFL optimization on Alloc instructions for pixel shaders
DISABLE_PIXEL_SHADER_CONSUME_SHFL - Disable SHFL optimization on Consume instructions for pixel shaders
DISABLE_COMPUTE_SHADER_ATOM - Disable general atomic optimizations for compute shaders
DISABLE_COMPUTE_SHADER_SUATOM - Disable surface atomic optimizations for compute shaders
DISABLE_COMPUTE_SHADER_ALLOC_SHFL - Disable SHFL optimization on Alloc instructions for compute shaders
DISABLE_COMPUTE_SHADER_CONSUME_SHFL - Disable SHFL optimization on Consume instructions for compute shaders
DISABLE_COMPUTE_SHADER_MINMAX - Disable atomic min + max optimization (compute shader only)
FILTERINGSHADER - Kill aniso on shader doing it's own filtering (DX10)
FILTERINGSHADER_SIMPLE_SEARCH - Search for shader filtering with a simple count (DX10)
FILTERINGSHADER_MIPOK - Consider filtering shaders with mipmapped textures
FILTERINGSHADER_ADDRESSMODE - Set the texture addressing mode for a self-filtering shader
LEVEL1_BBOX_PRIM_COUNT_MASK - Level1 Bounding Box Primcount Mask
MAX_CYCLES_WITHOUT_BINNER_DRAIN_MASK - Max cycles Without Binner Drain Mask
AREA_THRESHOLD_MASK - HW heuristic scaling factor (2.3 bit fixed point) Mask
AREA_THRESHOLD_SHIFT - First bit of HW heuristic scaling factor
DISABLE_APP_DETECTION - Don't use app identification to enable the perf strategy
DISABLE_MIXED_ATTRIBUTE_FORMATS - Disable loading mixed attribute formats through texture
DISABLE_ARCH_SPECIFIC_CHECK - Enable attribute to tex conversion on all architectures
DISABLE_SKIP_FLUSH_REDUNDANT_BINDS - Do not skip tiled cache flush on redundant RT/DS binds
DISABLE_OFF_Z_ONLY_BIND - Do not disable tiled cache when only z/stencil is bound
FLUSH_ON_AA_RESOLVE - Do not bin AA resolve together with AA rendering
FORCE_CAN_BIN_ACROSS_RT_BINDS - Force binning behavior across RT binds on multi-GPC parts
DISABLE_BINNING_CLEARS - Disable tiled caching for clears.
FORCE_WFI_AFTER_CLEARS - Force wait-for-idle after all clears.
DISABLE_HEAVYWEIGHT_BUNDLE_BINNABLE_OVERRIDE - Disables forcing safe heavy-weight bundles to be binnable (all heavyweight bundles NON-binnable)
DISABLE_PER_SEGMENT_GPFIFO - Disables hooking up a GPFIFO entry at segment boundaries
DISABLE_WITH_TESSELLATION_SHD - Disables tiled caching with tessellation shaders
DISABLE_WITH_GEOMETRY_SHD - Disables tiled caching with geometry shaders
DISABLE_WITH_PSI_SHD - Disables tiled caching with pixel shader interlock enabled pixel shaders
DISABLE_STEAM_VR_SMALL_PRIM_HWBUG_WAR - Disables the Steam VR perf test small prim WAR
FLIP_TILE_XY_DIMENSIONS - Inverts tile X,Y size calculations for cases where X != Y
INCLUDE_RT_ARRAY_SLICES_IN_BPP - Include multiple render target array slices in bits per pixel/tile size calculation
CB_MIN_THRESHOLD_MASK - Mask for CBTBL min threshold
CB_HIGH_THRESHOLD_MASK - Mask for CBTBL high threshold
CB_MAX_THRESHOLD_MASK - Mask for CBTBL max threshold (Maxwell multi-GPC only)
RT_TO_SRV_OVERRIDE - Override transition barriers of RT->NON_PS_SRV|SRV and make them RT->SRV. Leads to more PSBs. May corrupt images.
DEFER_ALL - Defer barriers until needed by next draw/dispatch/copy
DEFER_ALL_UNTIL_PCAS - DEFER ALL but also defer compute until PCAS. Experimental.
DEFER_ALL_CROSS_CL_DEFERRAL - DEFER ALL plus cross CL deferral. Defer resolving end of CL barriers until ECL time
DEFER_ALL_PRE_CROSS_CL_DEFERRAL - DEFER ALL with cross cl deferral enabled, plus defer CL barriers until ECL time. Experimental.
DEFER_ALL_NO_GRAPHICS_OPTIMIZATIONS - DEFER_ALL but with graphics optimizations turned off. For experiments.
DEFER_ALL_DISCARD_IN_DISPATCH_TABLE - DEFER ALL but always resolve pending syncs through dispatch table, regardless if discard is NOP or not. For experiments.
DO_ONLY_SYNC_NO_DEFERRAL - Do all the synchronization and invalidation immediately at the end of the barrier DDI, and don't defer them. For debugging.
NO_WFI_REMOVAL - Don't use reference value to remove any barriers, but always issue the synchronization
KEEP_REDUNDANT_BARRIERS - Don't remove redundant (readonly->readonly subset) barriers
DIRECT - Enable barrier deferal on direct queue
COMPUTE_ONLY - Enable barrier deferral on compute only queues
COPY_ONLY - Enable barrier deferral on copy only queues
TRANSITION - Enable barrier deferal for transition barriers
ALIASING - Enable barrier deferral for aliasing barriers
UAV - Enable barrier deferral for UAV barriers
RANGED - Enable barrier deferral for ranged barriers
ALL - Enable barrier deferral for all types of barriers
NONE - Don't disable any resource state
VERTEX_AND_CONSTANT_BUFFER - Disable for vertex and constant buffer state
INDEX_BUFFER - Disable for index buffer state
RENDER_TARGET - Disable for render target state
UNORDERED_ACCESS - Disable for unordered access state
DEPTH_WRITE - Disable for depth write state
DEPTH_READ - Disable for depth read state
NON_PIXEL_SHADER_RESOURCE - Disable for non-pixel shader resource state
PIXEL_SHADER_RESOURCE - Disable for pixel shader resource state
STREAM_OUT - Disable for stream out state
INDIRECT_ARGUMENT - Disable for indirect argument state
COPY_DEST - Disable for copy destination state
COPY_SOURCE - Disable for copy source state
RESOLVE_DEST - Disable for resolve destination state
RESOLVE_SOURCE - Disable for resolve source state
SHADING_RATE_SOURCE - Disable for shading reate source state
RAYTRACING_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE - Disable for accelleration structure state (shouldn't be encountered for now, invalid in API)
SR_NONE - No Variable Pixel Rate Shading
SR_CONSTANT_1x1 - Constant VPRS with shading rate 1x1
SR_CONSTANT_1x2 - Constant VPRS with shading rate 1x2
SR_CONSTANT_2x1 - Constant VPRS with shading rate 2x1
SR_CONSTANT_2x2 - Constant VPRS with shading rate 2x2
SR_CONSTANT_2x4 - Constant VPRS with shading rate 2x4
SR_CONSTANT_4x2 - Constant VPRS with shading rate 4x2
SR_CONSTANT_4x4 - Constant VPRS with shading rate 4x4
SR_CONSTANT_2xSS - Constant VPRS with shading rate 2xSS
SR_CONSTANT_4xSS - Constant VPRS with shading rate 4xSS
SR_CONSTANT_8xSS - Constant VPRS with shading rate 8xSS
SR_CONSTANT_16xSS - Constant VPRS with shading rate 16xSS
VPRS_FLAGS_FORCE_SHADING_RATE_SURFACE - Force usage of Shading Rate Surface even for Constant Shading Rate
VPRS_FLAGS_ENABLE_VPRS_FOR_SQUARE_RT - Force VPRS enabled even for square Render Targets. Default: VPRS is disabled for Square RT
VPRS_FLAGS_ENABLE_VPRS_FOR_SMALL_RT - Force VPRS enabled even for small (< 512x512) Render Targets. Default: VPRS is disabled for Small RT
DISABLE_TILE_POOL_MULTIALLOC - Force single allocs for tile pools
DISABLE_PTE_ALLOC_DEFERRAL - Allocate PTEs immediately on resource creation
FORCE_RT_DS_RESOURCES_TILED - Forces rendertarget and depthstencil textures to be created as tiled resources. Dx11 only. Doesn't force shared, present and internal resources
DEFAULT - Don't override what the driver normally uses
TIER_1 - Use up to Tier 2 resource binding, when supported by HW.
TIER_2 - Use up to Tier 2 resource binding, when supported by HW.
TIER_3 - Use up to Tier 3 resource binding, when supported by HW.
ENABLE_ON_ALL_RESOURCES - Enable UMD managed residency. All resource are made resident when created
EXCLUDE_RUNTIME_RESOURCES - Runtime is responsible for managing residency of runtime created resources. UMD will not handle residency
EXCLUDE_DESCRIPTORS - Runtime is responsible for managing residency of descriptors only, , UMD will not handle residency
USE_ROV_OLD - Use old conservative implementation path for ROV (low perf)
USE_ROV_NEW - Use new implementation path for ROV (high perf)
ON - Force eviction even when not necessary
OFF - Default D3D12 behavior - desc heap contents only guaranteed at execute
ON - The app promises that the desc heap contents will be immutable from record to execute
OFF - Default D3D12 behavior - no promotion
CBV_GRAPHICS - Promote CBV descriptors from descriptor tables to the root table for graphics
CBV_COMPUTE - Promote CBV descriptors from descriptor tables to the root table for compute
PROMOTE_UNINITIALIZED - Promote descriptor table entries, even if they are uninitialized (due to root signature changes etc
CTAS_SHIFT_MASK - Encode max number of CTAS to launch. The value in the mask will indicate CTAS to launch == 1 << CTA_SHIFT. All bits set == 1 thread per patch
CTAS_SHIFT_SHIFT - Amount of right shift for the CTAS_SHIFT
THREADS_PER_CTA_MASK - Each CTA is 32 * this amount
THREADS_PER_CTA_SHIFT - Amount of right shift for THREADS_PER_CTA
USE_BAR_FOR_PATCH_ENTRIES - Use BAR1 vidmem for patch data
USE_VIDMEM_GPFIFO_FOR_PATCH_DST - Use vidmem GPFIFO entries for the root data updates
USE_DESCHEAP_GPFIFO_DIRECT_PATCH - Use GPFIFO MME to patch root table entries directly from the descriptor heap
DISABLE_ALL - Do not allow multiple VAs per heap
ALLOW_RTVDSV - Allow RTVDSV Tier 1 heaps to have multiple VAs of different kinds
DISABLE_KEPLER - Disable the strategy for Kepler only
DISABLE_MAXWELL - Disable the strategy for Maxwell only
DISABLE_PASCAL - Disable the strategy for Pascal only
ENABLE_INTER_COMMANDLIST_QMD_SYNC - Use the compute synchronization kernel to synchronize QMD usage between command lists
ENABLE_COMPUTE_QUEUE_TIMESTAMP_QUERIES - Use the compute synchronization kernel to emit backend timestamps on compute queues
DEFAULT - Default driver behavior based on the wddm model: BLOCKLIST on wddm 1.x and MONITORED_FENCE on wddm 2.0 Hw Scheduling
BLOCKLIST - Force using blocklist backing store. (for debugging purposes only on wddm 2.x)
MONITORED_FENCE - Force using monitored fence backing store (won't work on wddm 1.x)
OFF - Disabled since SUST is slow due to RMW pain
ON - May not be perf optimal, for arch's experimentation
ALLOW_TARGETED_SMALL_SURF_COMPRESSION - compress small surfaces(currently on GA10x)
ALLOW_TARGETED_TEX_UAV_1BPP_COMPRESSION - compress 8bit per pixel tex/uav(currently on GA10x)
ON - Allow the driver to enable compression when possible
FORCE_ON - Force enabling compression on all buffers (might cause issues)
OFF - Disable compression on all BC textures
ON - Enable compression on all BC textures
ENABLE - Enable reporting of exceptions (api visible exceptions can be masked with other bits)
ENABLE_API_ILLEGAL_EXCEPTIONS - Enable reporting of recoverable exceptions which are illegal in api
ENABLE_API_LEGAL_EXCEPTIONS - Enable reporting of api legal exceptions (like out of bound accesses)
DISABLE_TEX_FORMAT_EXCEPTIONS - Disable reporting of Tex Format exceptions. Generally not recommended. Available Volta+
DISABLE_TEX_LAYOUT_EXCEPTIONS - Disable reporting of Tex Layout exceptions. Generally not recommended. Available Volta+
GT16RG - Enable D3DFMT_R16F, D3DFMT_R32F, D3DFMT_G16R16, D3DFMT_G16R16F, D3DFMT_G32R32F
MASK - Mask of all format bits
TEST - Print message at callback time
STATS_RESET - Reset stats (on XP, only GPU cyclestats)
GPUVIEW_EVENT - Emits NV - D3DHOTKEY event that GPUVIEW can capture
STUTTERSTATS_EVENT - Emits D3DHOTKEY event that Stutterstats can capture
CYCLESTATS_EVENT - Emits HOTKEY event that Cyclestats can capture
KEYS_MASK - Mask of all callback functions
HOTKEY - enable switching null hardware on/off by hotkey (ctrl+F8)
VERTEX_SHADER - Enable prevent negative SQRT in VS
GEOMETRY_SHADER - Enable prevent negative SQRT in GS
PIXEL_SHADER - Enable prevent negative SQRT in PS
HULL_SHADER - Enable prevent negative SQRT in HS
DOMAIN_SHADER - Enable prevent negative SQRT in DS
COMPUTE_SHADER - Enable prevent negative SQRT in CS
FORCE_GETDATA_FLUSH - Force GetData to flush command buffer
FORCE_GETDATA_WAITFORDATA - Force GetData to wait for query results
DUMP_LOG - Dump a log file, located in the root path, named RID.txt
DUMP_RT_AFTER_PRESENT - Dump render targets after each present call.
DUMP_DS_AFTER_PRESENT - Dump depth stencil textures after each present call.
CREATE_FRAME_DIRECTORIES - Create a new directory for each frame (named Frame###) to separated image files from different frame numbers.
ENABLE_HOTKEYS - Enable the use of hotkeys to choose which frames to dump.
DUMP_RT_AFTER_DRAW - Dump images of all render targets after every draw call.
DUMP_DS_AFTER_DRAW - Dump images of all the depth stencil views after every draw call.
DUMP_VS_SRV_AFTER_DRAW - Dump all vertex shader resource views after each draw call.
DUMP_HS_SRV_AFTER_DRAW - Dump all hull shader resource views after each draw call.
DUMP_DS_SRV_AFTER_DRAW - Dump all domain shader resource views after each draw call.
DUMP_GS_SRV_AFTER_DRAW - Dump all geometry shader resource views after each draw call.
DUMP_PS_SRV_AFTER_DRAW - Dump all pixel shader resource views after each draw call.
DUMP_VS_SRV_AFTER_PRESENT - Dump all vertex shader resource views after each present call.
DUMP_HS_SRV_AFTER_PRESENT - Dump all hull shader resource views after each present call.
DUMP_DS_SRV_AFTER_PRESENT - Dump all domain shader resource views after each present call.
DUMP_GS_SRV_AFTER_PRESENT - Dump all geometry shader resource views after each present call.
DUMP_PS_SRV_AFTER_PRESENT - Dump all pixel shader resource views after each present call.
DUMP_ALL_AFTER_CROSSADAPTER_COPY - Dump both src and dst after copy
DUMP_ERRORLOG - Dump Errors in log file, located at root path, named ErrorLog.txt
CREATE_FRAME_DIRECTORIES - Create a new directory for each frame (named Frame###) to separated image files from different frame numbers
ENABLE_HOTKEYS - Enable the use of hotkeys to choose which frames to dump
DUMP_BEFORE_DRAW - Dump before every draw call
DUMP_AFTER_DRAW - Dump after every draw call
DUMP_BEFORE_PRESENT - Dump before each present call
DUMP_AFTER_PRESENT - Dump after each present call
DUMP_BEFORE_BLT - Dump before every blit call
DUMP_AFTER_BLT - Dump after every blit call
DUMP_BEFORE_COLORFILL - Dump before each colorfill call
DUMP_AFTER_COLORFILL - Dump after each colorfill call
DUMP_BEFORE_DEPTHFILL - Dump before each depthfill call
DUMP_AFTER_DEPTHFILL - Dump after each depthfill call
DUMP_BEFORE_UPDATESUBRES - Dump before Update Subresource call
DUMP_AFTER_UPDATESUBRES - Dump after Update Subresource call
DUMP_BEFORE_PRESENT_MSHYBRID - Dump before each present call
DUMP_AFTER_PRESENT_MSHYBRID - Dump after each present call
DUMP_BEFORE_BLT_MSHYBRID - Dump before every blit call
DUMP_AFTER_BLT_MSHYBRID - Dump after every blit call

CustomSetting.UserfriendlyName: Export Performance Counters for DX9 only

CustomSettingValue.UserfriendlyName: DISABLE_AA_PROMOTION - MCP89/GT21A only: Disable C24 promotion to C32 for AA surfaces
SMART - smart dithering (enabled at higher resolutions)
SIMCLASS_G84_TESLA - G84_TESLA. Maps to class G82_TESLA.
GK104 - KEPLER - GK104. Supported on Vista with Fermi/Kepler GPU
GM108 - MAXWELL - GM108. Supported on win7 with Kepler GPU
GM204 - MAXWELL - GM204. Supported on win7 with Maxwell GPU
GP100 - PASCAL - GP100. Supported on win7 with Maxwell GPU
GV100 - VOLTA - GV100. Supported on win7 with Maxwell GPU
TU102 - TURING - TU102. Supported on win7 with Maxwell GPU
GA100 - AMPERE - GA100. Supported on win7 with Maxwell GPU
GA102 - AMPERE - GA102. Supported on win10 with Turing/AmpereA GPU
FLIPINTERVAL2 - Force Vsync on; wait at least 2 vsyncs between flips (30 fps max)
FLIPINTERVAL3 - Force Vsync on; wait at least 3 vsyncs between flips (20 fps max)
FLIPINTERVAL4 - Force Vsync on; wait at least 4 vsyncs between flips (15 fps max)
OFF - Leave the original behavior, OS flip
ON - Use the NV flip internal
DYNAMIC - Let the driver heuristic decide when to compile a regular GS into a FastGS. This is the default.
ALWAYS - The driver will ALWAYS try to compile for Fast GS. It may still fail if the shader or states are incompatible.
NEVER - The driver will NEVER try to compile for Fast GS.
DYNAMIC - Let the driver heuristic decide when to use primitive order or the viewport order. This is the default.
ALWAYS - The driver will ALWAYS tell the hardware to use the Viewport Order.
NEVER - The driver will NEVER tell the hardware to use the viewport order (it will use the primitive order).
DYNAMIC - Let the driver heuristic decide when to enable the WAR
ALWAYS - Whenever the driver encounters a Fast GS it will compile it with the WAR
NEVER - The driver will NEVER try to compile a Fast GS with the WAR.
DEFAULT - Flush deferred backend copies based on perfstrat heuristics.
NO_DEFERRAL - Debug: Issue each backend copy at end report time.
SKIP_WAIT_ON_CLEAR - Debug: Skip waiting for clear on begin. (after query memory reused)
DISABLE_OCCLUSION_BINNING - Fallback to kepler queries if app specifies D3D10_QUERY_OCCLUSION.
DISABLE_PREDICATE_BINNING - Fallback to kepler queries if app specifies D3D10_QUERY_OCCLUSION_PREDICATE.
DISABLE_PREDICATE_HINT_BINNING - Fallback to kepler queries if app specifies D3D10_QUERY_MISC_PREDICATEHINT.
ALLOW_PS - Used by driver to filter shaders by shader type
ALLOW_CS - Used by driver to filter shaders by shader type
ZEROP_ALLOW_CODE_MOTION - Flag to allow code motion in ZeroPloit optimization
ZEROP_PERFORM_UNIFORM_CHECK - Flag kept for future reference/work (unused for now)
ZEROP_ENABLE_ZEROP - Flag to enable ZeroPloit optimization
ZEROP_ENABLE_BB_FREQ_OPTIS - Flag as to whether OCG profiler should store BB frequency for remaining PGO
ZEROP_REORDER_COLD_BBS - Flag to allow reordering of cold blocks, unused for now
DEFAULT_WHOLEPSO - Perform WholePSO compilation irrespective of attribute ordering mismatch
OPTIMIZED_WHOLEPSO - Perform Single Stage Functionally correct Recompilation of PS only in case of MS PS SIgnature Mismatch
SINGLE_STAGE - Perform Single Stage compilation irrespective of attribute ordering mismatch - may be functionally incorrect
FORCE_AA_ON_A16B16G16R16F_TEXTURES_OF_PRIMARY_SIZE - Force AA on 4xFP16 textures the same size as the primary flip chain
FORCE_AA_ON_A32B32G32R32F_TEXTURES_OF_PRIMARY_SIZE - Force AA on 4xFP32 textures the same size as the primary flip chain
DISABLE_AA_ON_PRIMARY - Disable AA on the primary flip chain
ENABLE_Z_PARTITIONING_FOR_VCAA - Enable Z partitioning when using VCAA
UPGRADE_Z24_TO_Z32_FOR_Z_PARTITIONING - Upgrade Z24 surfaces to Z32 when Z partitioning is enabled
FORCE_SUPERSAMPLING_ON_PRIMARY - Force supersampling on the primary flip chain
