DEFAULT_PASCAL_B - PASCAL_B class default for this method
DEFAULT_VOLTA_A - VOLTA_A class default for this method
DEFAULT_TURING_A - TURING_A class default for this method
DEFAULT_AMPERE_A - AMPERE_A class default for this method
DEFAULT_AMPERE_B - AMPERE_B class default for this method
DEFAULT_FERMI - Fermi class default for this method
DEFAULT_KEPLER - Kepler class default for this method
DEFAULT_MAXWELL - Maxwell class default for this method
DEFAULT_PASCAL_A - PASCAL_A class default for this method
DEFAULT_PASCAL_B - PASCAL_B class default for this method
DEFAULT_VOLTA_A - VOLTA_A class default for this method
DEFAULT_TURING_A - TURING_A class default for this method
DEFAULT_AMPERE_A - AMPERE_A class default for this method
DEFAULT_AMPERE_B - AMPERE_B class default for this method
ENABLE_CROP_ALL - GA10x+ only. Enable bit 29 in NV_PGRAPH_PRI_GPCS_ROPS_CROP_DEBUG1
ENABLE_ZROP_ALL - GA10x+ only. Enable bit 28 in NV_PGRAPH_PRI_GPCS_ROPS_ZROP_DEBUG2
DISABLED - disable for both 3D and COMPUTE channels.
DEFAULT - default is SM_SCH_MODE_TEX_HASH_BLOCK_VTG_COMPUTE disabled for 3D and COMPUTE channels
OFF - force to disable renetrancy shim
INTEGER_AND_FRACTION - Use integer + fraction. Fermi's behavior.
INTEGER_ONLY - Use integer only. DX desired behavior.
DECOMPRESS_FOR_NAIVE_ENGINES - Decompress only for naive engines
DEFAULT - Allow in-place decompression, and decompress only for naive engines.
USE_API_DEFAULTS - ZERO on Dx1x, Todo Dx9
NORANGECHECK - Disable range checking for converted loads
FORCERANGECHECK - Force range-check on, even for RootSig V1.1
ALL - All handled types are emulated
ALL - Emulate for all shader stages
UNUSED - Formerly OCG_RANGE, which is now permanently the way of things
OCG_RANGE_HEADER - Use the OCG OOR check in getVAandSizeFromResource - this will enable constExpr for the header loads
ULDC_LOAD - Allow conversion from LDG to ULDC for data loads
ULDC_LOAD_HEADER - Allow conversion from LDG to ULDC for header loads
DISABLED - No translation of LDC to LDG
DIVERGENT_ONLY - Only translate divergent, dynamically-indexed LDCs
ONLY_REQUIRED - Only emit bounds check if requried by API
ENABLE_STG_RAW - ConvertToSTG - do global stores for store_raw
ENABLE_STG_STRUCTURED - ConvertToSTG - do global stores for store_structured
DISABLE - Disable the control of CE usage
BUFFER_UPLOADS_DOWNLOADS - Buffer uploads and downloads will use CE
TEXTURE_UPLOADS_DOWNLOADS - Texture uploads and downloads will use CE
TEXTURE_STAGING_UPLOAD - Texture staging upload during Unmap in Map->Update->Unamp will use CE
DISABLED_FOR_WIN10_OS_BUG_200549489 - Disable large page support only for Win10 OS having the large page mapping bug (OS <= 19638)
DISABLE_NOWFI_TEX_UPLOAD_IN_DSR - disable usage of 3D I2M for DSR uploads
FORCE_NOWFI_TEX_UPLOAD - force usage of 3D I2M for all uploads
OFF - GCC Prefetch DXR Strat Disabled
ON - GCC Prefetch DXR Strat Enabled
OFF - Toggle Disabled, switch GCC prefetch off once on first DXR call
ON - Toggle GCC prefetch around DispatchRays
APPLY_MASK_TO_COD - Apply SM_DISABLE_MASK to QMD's launched from the Compute Only Device
APPLY_MASK_TO_D3D - Apply SM_DISABLE_MASK to QMD's launched from the D3D Device
DISALLOW_SYNC - Disallow use of rotated mask for sync compute queues
DISALLOW_ASYNC - Disallow use of rotated mask for async compute queues
CONDITIONAL_PASCAL - enabled conditionally, for GP10x specifically
CONDITIONAL_PASCAL_PLUS - enabled conditionally, for all chips >= GP10x
GFX_PIX_QUADS_0 - Count # of 3D PIX Quads launched per cycle
WARP_DRAIN - Count # of warps waiting to drain per cycle
OCCUPANCY_EXCL_ISBE - Count most occupied Gfx resource excluding ISBE
OFF - Use default SM SCG configuration
ON - Use max allowed SMs for fast drain
DISABLE_CL_HAZARD_DETECT - Disables cross command list hazard resolution (can cause RC errors)
DISABLE_YIELD_ON_DRAW - Disable pushing of yields on draw (based on yields_per_frame). Experimental.
DISABLE_YIELD_ON_PSO_CHANGE - Disable pushing of yields on PSO change
DISABLE_YIELD_ON_RT_CHANGE - Disable pushing of yields on RT change
FORCE_GR_SEMAPHORE_WFI - Forces semaphore release/acquire based WFIs for graphics queues
FORCE_CS_SEMAPHORE_WFI - Forces semaphore release/acquire based WFIs for compute queues
FORCE_GR_HOST_WFI - Forces host release/acquire based WFIs for graphics queues
FORCE_CS_HOST_WFI - Forces host release/acquire based WFIs for compute queues
DISABLE_STATIC_CONFIG - Disables all static configurations of SCG.
DISABLE_CL_INITIAL_DESCRIPTOR_HEAP_SET_ON_PBDMA1 - Disables setting initial descriptor heap on PBDMA1
ENABLE_SMSCG_WITH_DXR - Enable SMSCG, even with DXR workloads
ENABLE_SMSCG_WITH_META_COMMANDS - Enable SMSCG, even with DX meta commands
ENABLE_SMSCG_DEFERRED_INIT - Wait until async compute queue is used to enable SMSCG
DISABLE_SMSCG_BUILD_BVH_COMPUTE - Disable SMSCG for compute command buffers that do BVH build
DISABLE_SMSCG_DISPATCH_RAYS_COMPUTE - Disable SMSCG for compute command buffers that do Dispatch Rays
DISABLE_SMSCG_EMIT_BVH_INFO_COMPUTE - Disable SMSCG for compute command buffers that do emit BVH info
DISABLE_SMSCG_COPY_BVH_COMPUTE - Disable SMSCG for compute command buffers that do copy BVH
DISABLE_SMSCG_SET_PIPELINE_STATE_COMPUTE - Disable SMSCG for compute command buffers that set DXR pipeline state
DISABLE_SMSCG_INIT_META_COMMAND_COMPUTE - Disable SMSCG for compute command buffers that init meta commands
DISABLE_SMSCG_EXECUTE_META_COMMAND_COMPUTE - Disable SMSCG for compute command buffers that execute meta commands
DISABLE_SMSCG_LAUNCH_CUBIN_COMPUTE - Disable SMSCG for compute command buffers that execute meta commands
DISABLE_SMSCG_COMPUTE_MASK - Mask of all compute flags
DISABLE_SMSCG_BUILD_BVH_DIRECT - Disable SMSCG for direct command buffers that do BVH build
DISABLE_SMSCG_DISPATCH_RAYS_DIRECT - Disable SMSCG for direct command buffers that do Dispatch Rays
DISABLE_SMSCG_EMIT_BVH_INFO_DIRECT - Disable SMSCG for direct command buffers that do emit BVH info
DISABLE_SMSCG_COPY_BVH_DIRECT - Disable SMSCG for direct command buffers that do copy BVH
DISABLE_SMSCG_SET_PIPELINE_STATE_DIRECT - Disable SMSCG for direct command buffers that set DXR pipeline state
DISABLE_SMSCG_INIT_META_COMMAND_DIRECT - Disable SMSCG for direct command buffers that init meta commands
DISABLE_SMSCG_EXECUTE_META_COMMAND_DIRECT - Disable SMSCG for direct command buffers that execute meta commands
DISABLE_SMSCG_LAUNCH_CUBIN_DIRECT - Disable SMSCG for direct command buffers that execute meta commands
DISABLE_SMSCG_DIRECT_MASK - Mask of all direct flags
DISABLE_SMSCG_DEFAULT_COMPUTE - Flag disables SMSCG on compute command buffers that do not use DXR or Meta Commands
DISABLE_SMSCG_DEFAULT_DIRECT - Flag disables SMSCG on direct command buffers that do not use DXR or Meta Commands
ENABLE_SCG_AT_HIGH_LEVEL - AutoSCG achieved by moving compute work to a driver created compute only CL
ENABLE_SCG_AT_LOW_LEVEL - AutoSCG achieved by moving compute work to a different channel at low level
DUMP_ASYNC_CS_DEVICE_SHADER_HASH - Dump compute shader hashes used on compute only devices to the debug file
DUMP_SYNC_GR_CS_DEVICE_SHADER_HASH - Dump graphics/compute shader hashes used on sync devices to the debug file
DUMP_SHADER_GROUP_TIMESTAMPS - Dump host timestamps of PSO binds for cross engine correlation
REMOVE_REDUNDANT_HASHES - Removes redundant references to hashes already marked for dump
DUMP_TO_DEBUGGER - Dumps hashes/timelines to debugger instead of debug file
ENABLE_WITH_DDI_SHIMS - Enable command list promotion in the presence of DDI shims (can be dangerous)
ENABLE_FOR_MULTIPLE_DIRECT_QUEUES_ONLY - Only enable when we have multiple direct command queues
ENABLE_COPY_PROMOTION - Enable single copy only promotion
ENABLE_ALIASING - Promote tiled resource aliasing hazards

REORDER_AND_GROUP_PARAMETERS - if set, splits parameters into Pixel Shader visible & not visible groups (multiple of 32DWORD hw supported granularity). And reorder even sized parameters to have even VA/offset in root table. That will make OCG generate ULDC.64 instead of two ULDC.32
DISABLE - legacy behaviour, does not use turing conditional trap.
ENABLE - if set uses monitored fence(conditional trap) for refCount hasReached.
FORCE_COMPUTE_ON_3D - if set uses Compute monitored fence(conditional trap) for refCount instead of 3D.
ENABLE_COMPUTE_DX1x_SCG - if set uses Compute interrupt on helper channel for NvAPI SCG.
FORCE_CE_ON_3D - if set uses Copy monitored fence(conditional trap) for refCount instead of 3D.
IGNORE_CE_HW_WAR - if set ignores CE additional dummy fence write for CE HW WAR.
IGNORE_HASHVA_RELEASE - if set release 1 to hash VA skipped.
ENABLE_LEGACY - if set uses unconditional interrupt on pre-Turing (can be used for Pascal).
ENABLE_DBG_PRINT - if set prints debug traces with GPU/CPU VA and methods push.
OFF - GA10x+ uses 64-bit values for reference counts.
ON - GA10x+ uses 32-bit values for reference counts
ENABLE_SCG_GPU_STATE_HAZARD_ANNOTATION - Dumps SCG GPU hazard information
ENABLE_ENTRY_POINT_ANNOTATION - Dumps all enter/exit entry points (extremely verbose)
ENABLE_CUSTOM_ANNOTATION - Dumps a variety of hard-coded entrypoints
ENABLE_PUSHER_ANNOTATION - Dumps pusher information, including flush/present
ENABLE_HOTKEY - Waits for hotkey to start profiling and dump (ctrl+F7)
ENABLE_EXTERNAL_PROCESS_NOTIFICATION - Signals event on profiling start, and waits for event to complete. Use with ENABLE_HOTKEY.
ENABLE_PERF_INSPECTOR_FILENAME - Uses a PerfInspector-compatible filename format
ENABLE_EXIT_ON_COMPLETION - After TRACKED_SEMAPHORE_FRAMES or when PerfInspector signals to stop, terminate the process
DRIVER_CONTROLLED - Right now, default == use semaphore
MODE_CONTROL_MASK - The mask for the field representing above modes
DISABLE_GP10x_HYSTERESIS - a flag to disable GP10x CWD hysteresis on CS to CS hazards
FORCE_FE_METHOD_SEMAPHORE - a flag to force FE method semaphore in addition to QMD seaphores on CS to CS hazards (old code)
DRIVER_CONTROLLED - default depends on GPU type
MODE_CONTROL_MASK - The mask for the field representing above modes
FORCE_HOST_WAIT - A flag to force WFI path using host waits instead of WFI invalidates
LOG_PER_FRAME_SCG_QUERY - Enable collecting Gr/CS cycle counts through GP10x SCG queries
GRAPHICS_ACTIVE_CYCLES - GraphicsActiveCycles, the total number of clocks where any graphics resource is occupied.
COMPUTE_ACTIVE_CYCLES - ComputeActiveCycles, the total number of clock where any compute resource is occupied.
IDLE_CYCLES - IdleCycles, the total number of clocks where no graphics or compute resource is occupied.
GRAPHICS_OCCUPANCY - GraphicsOccupancyWithIsbes, the graphics resource occupancy as a percentage, based on the usage of warp IDs, LRF, GFXTRAM, and ISBEs.
DEBUG_COUNTER - Usage varies based on NV_PGRAPH_PRI_GPCS_TPCS_MPC_VTG_DEBUG bits[10:9].
COMPUTE_OCCUPANCY - ComputeOccupancy, the compute resource occupancy as a percentage, based on the usage of warp IDs, LRF, shared memory, barrier and CTA IDs.
R_CHANNEL - Fill R channel with the selected color
G_CHANNEL - Fill G channel with the selected color
B_CHANNEL - Fill B channel with the selected color
A_CHANNEL - Fill A channel with the selected color
MIP_0 - Fill Mip 0 with the selected color
MIP_1 - Fill Mip 1 with the selected color
MIP_2 - Fill Mip 2 with the selected color
MIP_3 - Fill Mip 3 with the selected color
MIP_4 - Fill Mip 4 with the selected color
MIP_5 - Fill Mip 5 with the selected color
MIP_6 - Fill Mip 6 with the selected color
MIP_7 - Fill Mip 7 with the selected color
MIP_8 - Fill Mip 8 with the selected color
MIP_9 - Fill Mip 9 with the selected color
MIP_10 - Fill Mip 10 with the selected color
MIP_11 - Fill Mip 11 with the selected color
MIP_12 - Fill Mip 12 with the selected color
MIP_13 - Fill Mip 13 with the selected color
MIP_14 - Fill Mip 14 with the selected color
MIP_15 - Fill Mip 15 with the selected color
ALL - Fill all mips with selected color
OFF - Disable MME64 usage of DMA Read Port.
ON - Enable MME64 usage of DMA Read Port.
PS_TO_PS - ENABLE effect only on ps to ps hazards
CS_TO_CS - ENABLE effect only on cs to cs hazards
DISABLED - Disable all non-default HW WARs
TURING_WAR_2042382 - Enable WAR for https://nvbugs/2042382 - discovered during debug of http://nvbugs/200716475/43
OFF - SLI Video link is enabled
ON - SLI Video link is disabled
FORCE_ENABLE - Enable direct nvInst->NVIR conversion, regardless of defaults
FORCE_DISABLE - Disable direct nvInst->NVIR conversion, regardless of defaults
FORCE_ENABLE - Enable direct nvInst->NVIR conversion, regardless of defaults
FORCE_DISABLE - Disable direct nvInst->NVIR conversion, regardless of defaults
SPACE_SEARCH - "" // Enable interaction with external entity
DEBUG_OUTPUT - "" // Enable tracing via debug dumps
HASH_COPARGS - "" // Enable hashing of COP arguments
TRIMMED_VECTORS - "" // Spit out normalized opt sequences
DISABLE_FOR_SULD - force SYS scope (disables L1 caching) for SULD instructions of non-coherent UAVs
DISABLE_FOR_SUST - force SYS scope (disables L1 caching) for SUST instructions of non-coherent UAVs
ALLOW_FOR_SUATOM - force CTA scope (ENABLES L1 caching) for SUATOM/SURED instructions UAVs. This is generally disallowed by the DX spec
MISCSTRING - make WGF2UM_EVENT_MISCSTRING events externally visible
HOTKEY - make WGF2UM_EVENT_HOTKEY events externally visible
DEVICE - make WGF2UM_EVENT_DEVICE events externally visible
ENTRYPOINT - make WGF2UM_EVENT_ENTRYPOINT events externally visible
SYNC - make WGF2UM_EVENT_SYNC events externally visible
SLITRANSFER - make WGF2UM_EVENT_SLITRANSFER events externally visible
QUERY - make WGF2UM_EVENT_QUERY events externally visible
LOADBALANCE - make WGF2UM_EVENT_LOADBALANCE events externally visible
STUTTERSTATS_FRAME - make WGF2UM_EVENT_STUTTERSTATS_FRAME events externally visible
STUTTERSTATS_BLOCKCREATE - make WGF2UM_EVENT_STUTTERSTATS_BLOCKCREATE events externally visible
STUTTERSTATS_BLOCKDESTROY - make WGF2UM_EVENT_STUTTERSTATS_BLOCKDESTROY events externally visible
STUTTERSTATS_BLOCKPURGE - make WGF2UM_EVENT_STUTTERSTATS_BLOCKPURGE events externally visible
STUTTERSTATS_SHADERCOMPILE - make WGF2UM_EVENT_STUTTERSTATS_SHADERCOMPILE events externally visible
STUTTERSTATS_GPUSTALL - make WGF2UM_EVENT_STUTTERSTATS_GPUSTALL events externally visible
STUTTERSTATS_OUTOFORDER - make WGF2UM_EVENT_STUTTERSTATS_OUTOFORDER events externally visible
FBC - make WGF2UM_EVENT_FBC events externally visible
GENERICEVENT - make WGF2UM_EVENT_GENERICEVENT events externally visible (manifest only)
LOADBALANCE_MASTER - make WGF2UM_EVENT_LOADBALANCE_MASTER events externally visible
BLACK_FLAG_TIMER_RESOLUTION - make WGF2UM_EVENT_BLACK_FLAG_TIMER_RESOLUTION events externally visible
BLACK_FLAG_SYNC_MAP - make WGF2UM_EVENT_BLACK_FLAG_SYNC_MAP events externally visible
BLACK_FLAG_RENAME_STALL - make WGF2UM_EVENT_BLACK_FLAG_RENAME_STALL events externally visible
BLACK_FLAG_THREAD_AFFINITY - make WGF2UM_EVENT_BLACK_FLAG_THREAD_AFFINITY events externally visible
BLACK_FLAG_SYNC_UNMAP - make WGF2UM_EVENT_BLACK_FLAG_SYNC_UNMAP events externally visible
BLACK_FLAG_SYNC_COMPILE - make WGF2UM_EVENT_BLACK_FLAG_SYNC_COMPILE events externally visible
SLI_STALL_TIMES - make WGF2UM_EVENT_SLI_STALL_TIMES events externally visible
COMMAND_MEMORY_USAGE - make WGF2UM_EVENT_COMMAND_MEMORY_USAGE events externally visible
ENABLE_MEMORY_USAGE_EVENTS - Generates per frame events with combined memory usage of various command allocator/DXR related allocations.
ENABLE_MISC_ALLOC_EVENTS - Enable events for misc allocations. Vid staging buffer, QMD semaphore heap, gsb heap, launch qmd heap. Generate event on actual allocation.
ENABLE_MISC_REUSE_EVENTS - Enable events for misc allocations. Vid staging buffer, QMD semaphore heap, gsb heap, launch qmd heap. Generate event on reuse of idle allocation.
ENABLE_PERFSTRAT_ALLOC_EVENTS - Enable events for perfstrat dc heap allocations.
ENABLE_PERFSTRAT_REUSE_EVENTS - Enable events for perfstrat dc heap allocation reuse (of idle allocations).
ENABLE_DXR_LAUNCH_BUFFER_ALLOC_EVENTS - Enable events for DXR launch buffer allocations.
ENABLE_DXR_LAUNCH_BUFFER_REUSE_EVENTS - Enable events for DXR launch buffer allocation reuse (of idle allocations).
ENABLE_LMEM_ALLOC_EVENTS - Enable event when lmem is resized and triggers a reallocation.
ENABLE_SHADER_HEAP_ALLOC_EVENTS - Enable event when shader heap is resized/reallocated.
TRACK_BVH_ALLOCATIONS - Enable BVH resource tracking. Only valid if memory usage events are enabled.
TRACK_BVH_SCRATCH_ALLOCATIONS - Not implemented currently. Enable BVH scratch allocation tracking. Possibly expensive. Only valid if memory usage events are enabled.
TRACK_COMMAND_MEMORY_USAGE - Enable tracking of memory usage of command allocators. Only valid if memory usage events are enabled
FULLSCREEN - allow fullscreen apps to enable stereo
WINDOWED - allow windowed apps to enable stereo
CLIP_PRIMARY - clip rendering to primary rendertargets
CLIP_OFFSCREEN - clip rendering to offscreen rendertargets (by heuristic)
CLIP_INDICATOR - Indicate GPU bounds by leaving a frame blank (debug only)
FOREGROUND_POLICY_DEFAULT - If present window is a foreground window then assume this app is in foreground
FOREGROUND_POLICY_PRESENT_WND - If present window is a foreground window then assume this app is in foreground
FOREGROUND_POLICY_FORCE - Assume app is in foreground unconditionally
FOREGROUND_POLICY_FOREGROUND_WND - Assume app is in foreground if it owns the foreground window.
DBG_NONE - no method to be inserted
DBG_WFI - insert WFI after every draw/dispatch
DBG_CACHE_INVALIDATE_NONWFI - insert WFI-less version of methods for cache invalidation
DBG_CACHE_INVALIDATE_WFI - insert WFI after cache invalidation methods
DBG_CACHE_INVALIDATE_PSB - maxwell+ only. Any HW which does not support falls back to WFI invalidate
DBG_INVALIDATE_TEX_OR_SURF_DATA - invalidate tex or surf data
DBG_INVALIDATE_ALL_TARGETS - invalidate all the targets like texheaders,samplers,shaders,constants
DBG_ON_GRAPHICS - insert method on graphics pipeline
DBG_ON_COMPUTE - insert method on compute pipeline
GRAPHICS_NONWFI_INVALIDATE_CACHE_FOR_ALL - insert non-wfi invalidate method on all the targets for graphics
GRAPHICS_WFI_INVALIDATE_CACHE_FOR_ALL - insert wfi invalidate method on all the targets for graphics
GRAPHICS_PSB_INVALIDATE_CACHE_FOR_ALL - insert psb invalidate method on all the targets for graphics
COMPUTE_WFI_INVALIDATE_CACHE_FOR_ALL - insert wfi invalidate method on all the targets for compute
GRAPHICS_WFI - insert WFI after draw/dispatch for 3D
COMPUTE_WFI - insert WFI after draw/dispatch for compute
DBG_DEFAULT - special default case, insert after every draw/dispatch call
DBG_EVERY - insert after every draw/dispatch call
DBG_DRAW_MASK - draw mask frequency (upto every 65535 draw calls)
DBG_DISPATCH_MASK - dispatch frequency (upto every 65535 dispatch calls)
DRAW_FRQUENCY_20 - insert after every 20 draw calls
DISPATCH_FRQUENCY_20 - insert after every 20 dispatch calls
DRAW_FRQUENCY_100 - insert after every 100 draw calls
DISPATCH_FRQUENCY_100 - insert after every 100 dispatch calls
DUMP_RTV - dump the content of all rendertarget views - RTVs
DUMP_DSV - dump the content of all depth stencil views - DSVs
DUMP_STREAM - dump the geometry content using stream outputs
DUMP_GFX_UAV - dump the content of graphics unordered access views - UAVs
DUMP_GFX_SRV - dump the content of graphics shader resource views - SRVs or texture
DUMP_GFX_CBV - dump the content of graphics constant buffer views - CBVs
DUMP_GFX_GSCB - dump the content of the graphics state constant buffer - GSCB
DUMP_GFX_TEXHEADERS - dump the content of the graphics texture headers
DUMP_COMPUTE_UAV - dump the content of compute unordered access views - UAVs
DUMP_COMPUTE_SRV - dump the content of compute shader resource views - SRVs or texture
DUMP_COMPUTE_CBV - dump the content of compute constant buffer views - CBVs
DUMP_COMPUTE_GSCB - dump the content of the compute state constant buffer - GSCB
DUMP_COMPUTE_TEXHEADERS - dump the content of the compute texture headers
IGNORE_BAKED_BUNDLES - do not dump data per draw calls inside baked bundles
MISC_DISPATCH_FLUSH - force a command buffer dispatch and flush after every draw call
MISC_CHECK_DESCRIPTOR - do an extra check on descriptor before a draw call - ASSERT build only
IGNORE_BAKED_BUNDLES - do not do any misc operations per draw calls inside baked bundles
FORCE_DDI_CRITICAL_SECTION - Force a critical section on all DX12 commandlist DDI
FORCE_DDI_INTERLOCKED_CHECK - Force an interlocked check on all DX12 commandlist DDI
INCREASE_TIME_DDI_CALLS - Insert 1ms Sleep in command list DDI calls to catch reentrancy (g_IncreaseTimer)
USE_ZERO_FOR_INIT_DESCRIPTORS - Instead of using a canonical, valid null desc, use zeros
AMPERE_PLUS_FORCE_LEGACY - AmpereB+, Force Turing behaviour of Viewport based VPRS Lookup table for VS/GS Shading Rate.
FORCE_VPRS_NOT_SUPPORTED - Turing+, Force VRS not supported caps.
DISABLE - Setting 0 disables the new tracker
FORCE_FOR_GRAPBICS_TIMESTAMPS - Stress-testing: force the compute tracker for the graphics timestamps too
MAX_TRACKED_LAUNCHES_SHIFT - High 16 bits of the regkey store max number of launches per batch. When reached, the driver inserts a sync point.
MAX_TRACKED_LAUNCHES_DEFAULT - 0 for this field lets the driver to decide the default (0xFFFF is max supported by Ampere)
NO_OVERRIDE - No overrides, any subchannel switch causes all cache invalidates
FE0_CE_TO_COMPUTE - Ignore invalidates on the FE0 pipe for subchannel switches from CE to COMPUTE
FE0_3D_TO_COMPUTE - Ignore invalidates on the FE0 pipe for subchannel switches from 3D to COMPUTE
FE0_CE_TO_3D - Ignore invalidates on the FE0 pipe for subchannel switches from CE to 3D
FE0_COMPUTE_TO_3D - Ignore invalidates on the FE0 pipe for subchannel switches from COMPUTE TO 3D
FE1_CE_TO_COMPUTE - Ignore invalidates on the FE1 pipe for subchannel switches from CE to COMPUTE
SUBCHSW_TYPE_MASK - Mask of subchannel switch types
EXCLUDE_INV_SHADER_CACHES_INSTR - Set the bit to invalidate instruction caches (ie exclude from override)
EXCLUDE_INV_SHADER_CACHES_DATA - Set the bit to invalidate shader data caches (ie exclude from override)
EXCLUDE_INV_SHADER_CACHES_CONST - Set the bit to invalidate shader constant caches (ie exclude from override)
EXCLUDE_INV_SHADER_CACHES_LOCKS - Set the bit to invalidate shader locks caches (ie exclude from override)
EXCLUDE_INV_SAMPLER_CACHE - Set the bit to invalidate sampler cache (ie exclude from override)
EXCLUDE_INV_TEXTURE_HEADER_CACHE - Set the bit to invalidate texture header cache (ie exclude from override)
EXCLUDE_INV_MASK - Mask of invalidate bits that are assumed by default
INCLUDE_INV_RESTER_CACHE - EXPERIMENTAL (note reversed meaning): set the bit to disable invalidate of raster cache
INCLUDE_INV_ROP_MINI_CACHE - EXPERIMENTAL (note reversed meaning): set the bit to disable invalidate of ROP mini cache
ALL_LINES_BY_METHOD - The WAR forces all TSL2 lines to be invalidated by the invalidation methods
ALL_GCC_BY_PRI - The WAR sets PRI to force invalidation of all of GCC
VIDMEM_STAGING_ENABLE - Uses Staging buffer pinned to vidmem for file reads
HOST_STAGING_ALWAYS_MAPPED - Uses host staging buffer mapped for file reads always. Otherwise we map/unmap staging resource for file read and ECL.
ENABLE_DRIVER_THREAD - Use internal worker thread (threaded submissions)
NVME_BATCH_READS - NVMeFSBypass submits multiple reads togather.
NONE - None of the VR features are disabled
MULTI_RES_SHADING - If bit set, disables the Multi-Resolution Shading Feature
SINGLE_PASS_STEREO_X - If bit set, disables the Stereo-X Feature
LENS_MATCH_SHADING - If bit set, disables the Lens Match Shading Feature
VRCOMPOSITOR_NODE - If bit set, disables using SCGCompute node for VR on Pascal. i.e. keeps using LowLatency on Pascal
VARIABLE_RATE_SHADING - If bit set, disable the Variable Rate Shading Feature
SINGLE_PASS_STEREO_XYZW - If bit set, disable the Stereo-XYZW Feature
MULTIVIEW_RENDERING - If bit set, disable the Multi-View Rendering Feature
ON - Force the driver to create an Aftermath system on device creation.
MARKERS - When set, marker checkpointing will be available.
RESOURCE_TRACKING - When set, resource tracking will be available.
GENERATE_CRASH_DUMPS - When set, create GPU crash dump files if the GPU crash dump monitor is active.
GENERATE_SHADER_DEBUG_INFO - When set, create shader debug information files if the GPU crash dump monitor is active.
LOG_TO_FILE - Log aftermath dump out to a file (AFTERMATH_FILENAME)
DETAILED_MARKERS - Insert detailed driver markers (e.g. CPU callstacks)
AUTOMATIC_MODE - Aftermath will use run automatically when possible.
ON - Indicator to be displayed when Aftermath is in use.
MINIMAL - Default - only shows simple message for on/off and developer mode.
VERBOSE - Shows detailed overlay with configuration flags and marker counts. Requires AFTERMATH_INDICATOR_ENABLE set to ALWAYS.
SUPPRESS_ASSERT_RS1 - suppress assert on RS1 so that the test continues to run in automation without crashing
SUPPRESS_ASSERT_RS2 - suppress assert on RS2 so that the test continues to run in automation without crashing
SUPPRESS_ASSERT_ALL - suppress assert on all so that the test continues to run in automation without crashing
CBV_BIND_MODE_DEFAULT - DX11 Compute - HybridBindless, DX12 - PureBindless
ROOTCBV_MODE_FORCE_LDG - Use LDG for both Graphics and Compute RootCBVs
GRAPHICS_ROOTCBV_FORCE_LDCB - Use LDCB for Graphhics RootCBVs
COMPUTE_ROOTCBV_FORCE_LDCB - Use LDCB for Compute RootCBVs
ROOTCBV_MODE_FORCE_LDCB - Use LDCB for Compute RootCBVs
PUREBINDLESS - Use Purebindless mode for all surfaces
LEGACY - Use Legacy i.e. first 64 surfaces use Bound mode and later use PureBindless mode
DX11_LEGACY - Use legacy texture binding (tex/smp combos) for DX11. Falls back to bindless if tex/smp combo space is exhausted.
DX12_LEGACY - Use legacy texture binding (tex/smp combos) for DX12. Falls back to bindless if tex/smp combo space is exhausted.
SINGLE_CTA_PER_SM - Force single CTA/SM when shared memory emulation is used.
MAX_CTAS_PER_SM - Allow maximum number of CTAs per SM when shared memory emulation is used.
ENABLED_PREFERRED - Enabled for preferred problem sizes.
ENABLED_FORCED - Enabled for all supported problem sizes.
LOG_CREATE - Log create calls, and unsupported errors.
LOG_INIT_EXECUTE - Log init and execute calls.
DETAILED_PARAM_LOG - Log all paramater details for query and create calls. (Need to enable LOG_CREATE/LOG_QUERY bits too)
DUMP_OP_TENSOR_DATA - Dump output tensor at time of execute.
DUMP_IP_TENSOR_DATA - Dump input tensors at time of execute.
CUBIN_NVAPI_DX11 - Enable CBL path for DX11 cubin NVAPIs
CUBIN_NVAPI_DX12 - Enable CBL path for DX12 cubin NVAPIs
OFF - disable UMD direct submission of gpfifo
ON - enable UMD direct submission of gpfifo
OFF - disable reuse of free gpfifo space
ON - enable reuse of free gpfifo space
OFF - don't reset unused gpfifo entries
ON - reset unused gpfifo entries with NOPs
OFF - don't perform wait before deciding for gpfifo switch
ON - perform wait before gpfifo switch
STATIC - Gpfifo allocation capacities are non-uniform and, currently, statically hardcoded in the driver
REGKEY_BASED - Initial gpfifo allocation capacities are taken from regkeys, and then 2x or more scaling is done for further resizes
HOST - place UMD gpfifo on HEAP_HOST
VID - place UMD gpfifo on HEAP_VID
OFF - disable UMD direct submission of gpfifo in DX9
ON - enable UMD direct submission of gpfifo in DX9
OFF - disable UMD direct submission of gpfifo in DX9 SLI
ON - enable UMD direct submission of gpfifo in DX9 SLI
COMPRESS_ENTIRE_HEAP - Allocate entire heap as compressed and let it remain compressed
COMPRESS_ON_ADDITIONAL_MAPPING - Compress as and when resources are placed inside heap depending on CBC Heuristic
DISABLE_PIPELINED_COPY - Disable Pipelining of syncCE copy aka Data Transfer Type is non-pipelined and Flush_enable set to true
ENABLE_PIPELINED_COPY - Enable Pipelined Copy for Sync CE aka Pipelined + Flush_Enable = False
ONLY_CLEAR_ON_REQ_HW - Only clear when we believe the HW requires it.
CLEAR_ON_ALL_HW - Clear on all HW - even HW that shouldn't need it.
SKIP_CLEAR_ON_ALL_HW - Don't do clears on HW that needs it or not.
CLEAR_HW_MASK - Mask of the 3 HW selection modes.
SKIP_CLEAR_RTVS - Should RTV discards be ignored?
SKIP_CLEAR_DSVS - Should DSV discards be ignored?
MAX_TIER_0 - View instancing is disabled. Overrides arch specific reported tier.
MAX_TIER_1 - Maximum allowed tier is Tier-1 a.k.a draw looping.
MAX_TIER_2 - Maximum allowed tier is Tier-2.
MAX_TIER_3 - Maximum allowed tier is Tier-3.
ENABLE_ALL - Compression will be used for any primary.
DISABLE_SINGLE_GPU - Disable compression for primaries in single GPU.
DISABLE_SLI - Disable compression for primaries for SLI.
DISABLE_SFR_WITH_CE - Disable compression for primaries when SFR is in use and CE is used for present.
DISABLE_DX11_SFR - Disable for DX11 if SFR is used.
DISABLE_DX12_SFR - Disable for DX12 if SFR is used.
DISABLE_ALL - Disable compression for primaries in all modes.
ALLOW_MASTER - Allow the allocation in the Master GPU to use compression at all times
ALLOW_PRE_TURING - Allow primary compression on pre-Turing chips, moslty for testing purposes
ALL_SRV_ACCESSIBLE - Assume root signature infers all SRV resources are always accessible in GPU memory.
ALL_CBV_ACCESSIBLE - Assume root signature infers all CBV resources are always accessible in GPU memory.
ALL_UAV_ACCESSIBLE - Assume root signature infers all UAV resources are always accessible in GPU memory.
NO_SRV_ACCESSIBLE - Assume root signature infers no SRV resources are always accessible in GPU memory.
NO_CBV_ACCESSIBLE - Assume root signature infers no CBV resources are always accessible in GPU memory.
NO_UAV_ACCESSIBLE - Assume root signature infers no UAV resources are always accessible in GPU memory.
VRR_ENTROPY - VRR - prints a green '.' when GSYNC entropy is reported high. Debug or Develop driver builds only.
VRR_SUSPEND_REASON - VRR - prints the reason why GSYNC may have been suspended in DD. Debug or Develop driver builds only.
VRR_SUPPORT - VRR - prints whether G-sync is supported or not.
MASK - Mask of all valid bits.
NO_MIRROR_EGPU - Disable VR mirror window on eGPU configuration
NO_MIRROR - Disable VR mirror window on any configuration
OFF - Allocate QMD semaphore buffer in VID (old behaviour - not visible on CPU)
HOST - Allocate in HOST for CPU visibility
FORCE_TIER_DEFAULT - Caps expose default DXR tier
FORCE_TIER_1_0 - Force caps to expose D3D12DDI_RAYTRACING_TIER_1_0
FORCE_TIER_1_1 - Force caps to expose D3D12DDI_RAYTRACING_TIER_1_1
NORANGECHECK - Disable range checking for converted loads
ALL - All handled types are emulated
ALL - Emulate for all shader stages
NONE - DXR bundles or replay mode disallowed
NONE - Enable DXR with normal behavior
ENABLE_DXR_BUT_LEAK_PSOS - Enable DXR but leak PSOs ( see http://nvbugs/2422964 )
GRPS_OUTPUT_INDICATOR - Output GigaRaysPerSecond to on-screen indicator
RAYCOUNT_OUTPUT_FILE - Output Periodic Raycount to file
OFF - Force DXR to not use the TTU
ON - Default behavior. Use TTU when available
CHECK_ALL_TRANSITION_TYPES - All resource transitions trigger a hazard check
CHECK_BVH_VA_RANGES - Track bvh build VAs and use them in barrier hazard checks
FLUSH_ON_DISPATCHRAYS - Flush bvh builds whenever a dispatchRays call is hit
ALWAYS_FLUSH_AFTER_BATCH - Forces a flush after every batch. Effectively forces batch size of 1
PREFER_FAST_TRACE - Prefer trace over build performance
PREFER_FAST_BUILD - Prefer build over trace performance
MINIMIZE_MEMORY - Minimize memory usage, possibly at the cost of build and/or trace performance
PREFER_FAST_TRACE - Prefer trace over build performance
PREFER_FAST_BUILD - Prefer build over trace performance
MINIMIZE_MEMORY - Minimize memory usage, possibly at the cost of build and/or trace performance
MEGAKERNEL_PT - Megakernel scheduling with persistent threads.
BLOCKSYNC - Megakernel scheduling with intra CTA synchonized.
TRIANGLES_ONLY - Cull custom primitives and optimize the pipeline for triangles.
AABBS_ONLY - Cull triangles and optimize the pipeline for custom primitives.
DISABLED - Don't propagate flags from application.
OFF - Disable fast linking and fallback to normal CUDA style linking.
ON - Use fast linking during compilation and pipeline creation.
OFF - Never use bootstrap kernel (WARNING: DXR 1.1 and CFGPU depend on bootstrap kernel)
OFF - Use shader splitting for trace calls.
ON - Use coroutines for trace calls.
AUTO - Auto inline with rtcore heuristic
ALWAYS - Always inline when the trace depth <= 1
MAX - Sets the number of registers to the max allowed number of registers.
OFF - Never dump intermediate DXIL/NVVM files for DXR
ON - Always dump intermediate DXIL/NVVM files for DXR
ON - Enable Wks feature Indicator only
APP_MASK - Enable the indicator to app or DWM
APP - Enable the indicator to APP
DWM - Enable the indicator to DWM
DISABLED - Promote all copy commandlist/queues on MSHybrid to support 3D
ENABLED - Conditionally promote only DX runtime created copy commandlist/queue which have a cross adapter copy queued
DISABLE_BREAK_ON_ASSERT - Disable debug break on gpukAssert messages
ENABLE_BREAK_ON_SNAPSHOT - Enable debug break on gpukDebugSnapshot messages
ENABLE_BREAK_ON_WARNING - Enable debug break on gpukWarning messages
LOG_ASSERTS - Write gpukAssert messages to a file in PS_FILE_PATH
LOG_DEBUG_SNAPSHOTS - Write gpukDebugSnapshot messages to a file in PS_FILE_PATH
LOG_PRINTS - Write gpukPrint messages to a file in PS_FILE_PATH
LOG_WARNINGS - Write gpukWarning messages to a file in PS_FILE_PATH
LOG_ALL - Write all GPUKernel messages to a file in PS_FILE_PATH
USE_HOPPER_SM9_0_TRIM - Use Hopper SM 9.0 built with different flags
OFF - Force atomic hw queue submission off
ON - Enable atomic hw queue submission on HWS
DISABLE_VERTEX_SHADERS - Disable optimization for vertex shaders
DISABLE_PIXEL_SHADERS - Disable optimization for pixel shaders
SOA_COORDS - Re-org the LH constant buffer into a structure of arrays
USE_LDC - experimental maxwell code - use LDC for constant buffer lookup
SET_PERFKNOBA - Override perfknoba for the LH shaders
SET_CB_EVICTION - Set CB Eviction policy for GF119
COMPILE_IMMEDIATE - Compile LH shaders immediately - don't wait for the state profile'
DEFAULT_KEPLER - Kepler class default for this method
DEFAULT_MAXWELL - Maxwell class default for this method
DEFAULT_PASCAL_A - PASCAL_A class default for this method
DEFAULT_PASCAL_B - PASCAL_B class default for this method
DEFAULT_VOLTA_A - VOLTA_A class default for this method
OFF - Don't set perfknobA, regfile, maxquads
DEFAULT - Set perfknobA, regfile, maxquads based on chip ID
CHUNK_KNOWN_APPS - Chunk only known state buckets from specific apps for experimentation purposes
CHUNK_KNOWN_FULLSCREEN_DRAW_CALLS - Chunk only known full-screen draw calls
CHUNK_FULLSCREEN_DRAW_CALLS - Chunk all fullscreen draw calls tracker
CHUNK_DURING_PIPELINE_STATS_QUERIES - Enable chunking during pipelin-stats queries (WARNING: Exposes chunker to D3D API)
CHUNK_ON_TILED_CACHE_ARCH - Enable SW chunking on tiled cache architecture
CHUNK_ALL_BLENDING_DRAW_CALLS - Chunk all buckets with blending enabled
CHUNK_KNOWN_APPS - Chunk only known state buckets from specific apps for experimentation purposes
CHUNK_KNOWN_FULLSCREEN_DRAW_CALLS - Chunk only known full-screen draw calls
CHUNK_FULLSCREEN_DRAW_CALLS - Chunk all fullscreen draw calls tracker
CHUNK_ON_TILED_CACHE_ARCH - Enable SW chunking on tiled cache architecture
CHUNK_ALL_BLENDING_DRAW_CALLS - Chunk all buckets with blending enabled
STANDARD - export [0,16] corresponding to real + virtual coverage
MIN - export {0,1,2}, where 0 is no VCAA
SINGLE - export only 0, disabling VCAA. Control pannel can still enable VCAA
SHADOWMAPS_SPLITTING - 1 splits shadow maps, 0 renders them in broadcast
BROADCAST_DISPATCH - 1 broadcasts all dispatch calls without atomics in them, 0 splits them between GPUs
ALL_ENABLED - all heuristics in enabled stateS
DISABLE_DYNAMIC_SHADOWMAPS - disable dynamic shadow map splitting
MAP_NON_SHADOW_MAPS_LOCALLY - intended as perf experiment only - will create NON shadow map remote mappings, but will map them locally
ENABLE_FULLSCREEN_SCISSORS - intended as perf experiment only - will send full-screen scissors to HW instead of real SFR scissors
DISABLE_SCROSS_TRANSFERS_ON_BROADCAST - intended as perf experiment only - will disable cross transfers when broadcast rendering to split target happens
DISABLE_GPU_SYNC_BARRIERS - intended as perf experiment only - will disable flushes and semaphores used to synchronize GPUs with each other
DISABLE_PAGE_ALIGNMENT_TRANSFERS - intended as perf experiment only - will disable transfers occuring due to page boundary being not aligned with SFR scissor boundary
INVERT_SCISSOR_RANGES - if true, GPU0 will take lower part of the screen and GPU1 will take higher part of the screen
FORCE_FULL_RESOLVES - if true, remote texture mapping won't be needed - all textures will be fully resolved on access
DISABLE_P2P_CACHING - if true, P2P mappings for remote texture are created without cache flag
ENABLE_SOFTWARE_SEMAPHORES - if true, the default behaviour of (HW semaphores only) is switched to use (SW+HW semaphores)
DISABLE_BRIDGELESS_TRANSFER - if true, bridgeless transfer is disabled
ENABLE_LOCAL_APPEND_CONSUME - hidden counters will be locally mapped
DISABLE_GPU_WIDE_ATOMICS - refers to optimization of p2p atomics by combining multiple warps together and issuing one common atomic
ENABLE_COPY_ENGINE_TRANSFER - if true, uses copy engine to transfer boxes instead of 3D engine
DISABLE_OCCLUSION_QUERIES_TURING - enables SFR occlusion queries on Turing
ENABLE_TRIPLE_BUFFERING - enable triple buffering so that 3D can render to a surface when CE transfer is enabled

DISABLE_2D_UAV_ONLY_TILE_SHAPES_12 - DX12 resources can be tightly packed into heaps, so APICs can't replay if captured with different alignment. So provide a regkey to disable alignment on 2D UAV (non-RT/non-ZB) resources

DISABLE_3D_UAV_ONLY_TILE_SHAPES_12 - DX12 resources can be tightly packed into heaps, so APICs can't replay if captured with different alignment. So provide a regkey to disable alignment on 3D UAV (non-RT/non-ZB) resources
MAP_SHADOW_MAPS_LOCALLY - intended as perf experiment only - will create shadow map remote mappings, but will map them locally
NONP2_RESOURCE_SPLITS_SMALLEST_ASPECT_RATIO - non-power-two splitting strategy that prefer tiles of smallest aspect ratio
NONP2_RESOURCE_SPLITS_RESOURCES_ASPECT_RATIO - non-power-two splitting strategy that prefer tiles to foolow resource's aspect ratio
DISABLE_CUBIN_SPLIT - Disable splitting workload submitted through NVAPI cubin launcher
TEST_SINGLE - Debug testing flag. Apply Ampere checkerboard on single GPU for testing.
OPTIMIZE_READ_ACCESS - look for uav read instructions
OPTIMIZE_WRITE_ACCESS - look for uav write instructions
OPTIMIZE_ATOMIC_ACCESS - look for uav atomic instructions
OPTIMIZE_SRV_ACCESS - look for srv read instructions
OPTIMIZE_ACCESS_MASK - mask to select access control bits
RESOURCE_SLOT_MASK - mask of a field to store resouce slot to look for
RESOURCE_SLOT_SHIFT - first bit of a field to store resouce slot to look for
RESOURCE_SLOT_ANY - a special resource slot value to represent any slot (the driver will search)
CTA_SIZE_MASK - if the value, selected by the mask, is non-zero, it is min size of CTA (in WARPs) to allow optimizations
CTA_SIZE_SHIFT - the first bit of the cta_size field
CTA_SIZE_8 - a common predefined value (=8) for min size of CTA to allow optimization
SPLIT_ALGORITHM_MASK - which algorithm to use for splitting the compute shader; refer to ::computeSfrTiling for more details
SPLIT_ALGORITHM_SHIFT - first bit of the split algorithm
SPLIT_ALGORITHM_16REGION - algorithm that forces a 16-region split in the resource
SPLIT_ALGORITHM_4x4SINGLE - algorithm that starts with a 4x4 split and tries to correct height/width one at a time, for a single interation of the CPU implementation
ALLOW_HASH_BASED_OPT - enable optimization based on the table of shader hashes
AUTO_DX11 - enables automatic optimization for dx11
AUTO_DX12 - enables automatic optimization for dx12
WAR_345079 - Disable WAR for bug 345079 (dst_reduce color writemask bug)
WAR_353523 - Disable WAR for bug 353523 (disable dst_reduce for Half-Life 2: Episode 2)
WAR_246795 - Disable WAR for bug 246795 (disable dst_reduce when VCAA is in use)
WAR_451294 - Disable WAR for bug 451294 (improved WAR for dst_reduce color writemask bug)
OFF - Disable the Magnification API shim
ON - Enable the Magnification API shim
DISABLE_SHARED_ATOM - Disable the shared atom optimization.
DISABLE_UNIFORM_ATOM - Disable the uniform atom optimization.
OFF - Do not apply the WAR
ON - Apply the WAR (insert WFI whenever the amount of throttling changes)
